HI!!! I AM JAHMAI JONES!!!
I’m looking for more roles!! Would love to be considered for the lead male role in your upcoming projects!!!! 
 
I will be the 7th Black actor to win AND Oscar BEST MALE LEAD ACTOR! 

Sag Eligible 

#: 336-558-3146

My Ig: Instagram.com/jahmaitjones 

Email: jahmaihand98@gmail.com

D/O/B: 3/4/1998 (28 years old)

Race: African American 

Height: 5’9

Weight: 180 pounds 

Shirt: M

pants: 32x32

Imdb: Jahmai Jones
https://pro.imdb.com/mobile/name/nm12361753/?ref_=ext_shr_lnk

here is my full resume so far:

Article about me: “Jahmai Jones Hollywoods rising powerhouse article:” https://thrivetimes.us/jahmai-jones-hollywoods-rising-powerhouse/

My upcoming Leading role in “Red Nit” article about me: https://artviews.gr/o-amerikanos-ithopoios-jahmai-t-jones-protagonistei-sti-mikrou-mikous-tainia-tis-ellinidas-katerinas-sigala-me-titlo-red-

I am an award winning actor that’s won an award for BEST LEADING MALE ACTOR IN FILM🏆🏆🏆( I’ve also been nominated twice for awards )

I am a signed actor and model under Gray Models and Talent, LLC & Five Star Modeling and Talent agency BUT i do look for my own roles and submit myself!! I am 27 years old and I reside in Greensboro, NC. I am 5’9 180 pounds. 

I have landed 79 roles with 70 of them being main character/lead roles in movies and shows (46 shown on imbd so far) that are currently production/or finished. I am currently top 28k rated on IMDb as well. These movies and shows will be premiering on NETFLIX, tubi , primevideo, Apple TV , peacock , paramount plus , Hulu , starz and one  is headed to theaters and more in only 2 YEARS OF ACTING. YES ONLY 2 YEARS! I have a movie Forever loved has over 1.1 MILLION VIEWS WORLDWIDE ON ALL PLATFORMS & another movie Glistening in the snow that’s currently on peacock that i’ve won an award for for BEST LEADING MALE ACTOR IN FILM!!! Also my movie “Crossing the line” just released on tubi worldwide and was #1 Recommended in the world on tubi for 2 weeks straight!

i will be leading in a major SAG film coming out soon as well as leading in THREE movies going on NETFLIX next year that im leading in as well!

Yes i’ve only been acting since 2023! Only 3 2 and a half to 3 years i’ve been acting!

I’ve have been nominated for two awards and won one for best leading male actor in film. I have appeared in three magazines and 5 podcast interviews. 

Socials:

I’m up next!!!!! Follow me on instagram!!! : @jahmaitjones 

my instagram link: instagram.com/jahmaitjones?igsh=MWdocWtjZndrdjJtOQ%3D%3D&utm_source=qr

imdb (reels are in my imdb:  https://pro.imdb.com/mobile/name/nm12361753/?ref_=ext_shr_lnk

Shoot me an inbox if you would like to reach out to me about a potential role in your upcoming film!

or

Contact me here

#: 336-558-3146

My Ig: Instagram.com/jahmaitjones 

Email: jahmaihand98@gmail.com

I WILL BE YOUR SOON TO BE OSCAR, EMMY, AND GOLDEN GLOBE WINNER SOON!! 🏆
🏆

Here are clips of me acting!!!! it’s some clips in there that relate to this role that should help you see i can shine any role!!!

https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1259FqA_PipOC-GmQDWS8HjE4nrAI-rFC

Also you can go on tubi and watch my movie “Crossing the line” I play the lead character. You can also watch “Glistening in the snow” on Peacock and tubi. I play the lead role and won an award for that film. Also you can watch my supporting role in tubi called “Forever loved.” these will help you see me in action!! Has over 1 million views on YouTube and 3 million worldwide across all platforms !

Inbox me, text me or email me if you have a role for me!!!

items.text:
🎬 **REAL COUPLES WANTED — Beijing Film Academy MFA Thesis Short Films**

Hi Vancouver! I'm a grad student at **Beijing Film Academy** (one of the top film schools in Asia), and I'm shooting **three short ad films** for my MFA thesis project here in Vancouver.

**The concept:** Three everyday scenarios between a couple — eating hot pot, relaxing in/around water, and jumping on a bed together — filmed with a cinematic, dreamlike visual style. Think slow motion, close-ups, and beautiful lighting. The films explore how ordinary moments between two people can feel extraordinary.

**What you'd be doing:** — Eating hot pot together (feeding each other, reacting to spicy food, lounging on the couch after) — Interacting around water (splashing, getting close, leaning against each other) — Jumping and bouncing on a bed together (pillow fights, flopping down, catching your breath side by side)

Some scenes include light physical closeness — hugs, holding each other, a camera-angled kiss (no actual lip contact). Everything is shot tastefully and artistically. This is an academic film project, not a commercial shoot.

**What I need:** ✅ A real couple ✅ Ages 20–38

📅 **March 27 or 28** (one day, within 8 hours) 

Interested? DM me and I'll share the full concept + storyboards!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'FREEFALL Real Couples Wanted Beijing Film Academy MFA Thesis BeijigFlimAtademyMEAThesisProject Project :； March 27 or 28 One Day 8 Hours Vancouver $ Paid: $100 CAD Per Person DM or Email for Full Details 357045123a@gmail.com @gmail.com 357045123'

items.text:
**CASTING CALL FOR SHORT FILM - PLAN JINN**

SHORT FILM | UBCP ULB | OPEN TO UNION/NON-UNION ACTORS | HONORARIUM

FILMING DATES: ARPIL 17-19

LOCATION: VANCOUVER, BC

DIRECTOR/WRITER: ZEESHAN DHANANI

EMAIL YOUR HEADSHOTS, DEMO-REEL, CV to: info@yymediaco.com

 

**Characters: **

**Ayesha - Lead - Female - South Asian (20-25)**

A creative, intelligent, emotionally repressed young woman torn between filial duty and personal freedom. Sensitive yet quietly defiant. Has a deep inner life, theatre lover, former painter, dreamer.

 

**Ali (Baba) - Supporting - male - South Asian (50-60)**

A hardworking immigrant father who believes security equals love. Authoritative but not villainous, he truly believes he is protecting his daughter. Carries pride, fear, and generational trauma.

 

**Fatima (ammi) - Supporting - female - South Asian (50-60)**

A gentle, deeply conditioned woman who once lived Ayesha’s fate. Torn between empathy and survival. Her silence carries decades of compromise.

 

**Imam - principal - male - Open ethnicity (40-60)**

Calm, authoritative spiritual leader called to perform an exorcism. Grounded presence amid chaos.Requires strong vocal presence. Ritual recitation (Quran verses). Controlled physical blocking during exorcism.

**Mystic - principal - Female- Open ethnicity (30-70)**

A mysterious spiritual healer whose true nature may not be human. Calm, enigmatic, unsettling.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of ‎text that says '‎BE CAREFUL WHAT YOU WISH CAREFULWHATYOUWISHFOR FOR අටිම PLAN JINN ی_کیای کیای نیک WRITTEN & DIRECTED BY ZEESHANDHANANI ZEESHAN DHANANI SUPERNATURALTHILLER SUPERNATURAL THILLER‎'‎

items.text:
🎬 OD ZERA DO PLANU FILMOWEGO
Praktyczny przewodnik epizodysty

Chcesz spróbować swoich sił na planie filmowym, ale nie wiesz od czego zacząć?
A może byłeś już na planie i czujesz, że działasz trochę po omacku?

👉 Ten poradnik powstał, żebyś nie musiał uczyć się wszystkiego metodą prób i błędów.

💡 To wiedza od praktyka – nie teoria

Nazywam się Bartłomiej Skowron.
Zaczynałem od zera – bez znajomości, bez szkoły aktorskiej.

Wcześniej przez lata byłem w wojsku.
Dopiero później podjąłem decyzję, żeby zmienić życie i spróbować swoich sił na planie filmowym.

Dziś mam na koncie:
✔ ponad 100 projektów
✔ epizody w serialach i filmach (w tym produkcje Netflix)
✔ współpracę z rozpoznawalnymi aktorami
✔ doświadczenie, które zebrałem „od środka”
https://filmpolski.pl/fp/index.php?osoba=11200011
https://www.filmweb.pl/person/Bart%C5%82omiej+Skowron-2973719
https://www.imdb.com/name/nm13121784/?ref_=fn_t_1

👉 Ten poradnik to dokładnie to, czego sam potrzebowałem na starcie.

📘 Co znajdziesz w środku?

✔ Wstęp – jak wygląda prawdziwy początek
✔ Czym jest praca epizodysty w praktyce
✔ Moja historia – od wojska do planu
✔ Czy to jest dla Ciebie? (bez ściemy)
✔ Jak zacząć – pierwsze realne kroki
✔ Casting – jak to wygląda naprawdę
✔ Pierwszy dzień na planie – instrukcja przetrwania
✔ Zasady niepisane na planie
✔ Pieniądze, umowy i realia finansowe
✔ Co dalej – rozwój i możliwości
✔ Najczęstsze pytania i sytuacje kryzysowe

📖 Ponad 100 stron konkretnej wiedzy

Bez lania wody.
Bez motywacyjnych bajek.
Tylko realia tej branży.

🎥 Dlaczego warto?

✔ możesz zacząć nawet bez doświadczenia
✔ to realna opcja, żeby dorobić do budżetu
✔ poznasz ludzi z branży i znane twarze
✔ zbudujesz kontakty, które otwierają drzwi
✔ zobaczysz, jak naprawdę wygląda plan filmowy od środka

Dla jednych to przygoda.
Dla innych dodatkowy zarobek.
Dla niektórych – początek nowej drogi.

⚠️ To nie jest poradnik o „łatwej sławie”

To szczery przewodnik dla osób, które chcą wejść w ten świat świadomie i bez rozczarowań.

❤️ Kupując – pomagasz

Część dochodu ze sprzedaży zostanie przekazana na schronisko dla zwierząt 🐾

🔥 PROMOCJA: -20% tylko przez najbliższy tydzień

To najlepszy moment, żeby zacząć – taniej i z konkretną wiedzą w ręku.

🔥 Jeśli ja mogłem zacząć od zera – Ty też możesz.

⬇️Link do bezpośredniego zakupu 📲
https://www.naffy.io/bartlomiej-skowron/od-zera-do-planu-filmowego-praktyczny-przewodnik-epizodysty-oE1

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'OD ZERA PLANU DO DO praktyczny FILMOWEGO prze przewodnik odnik epizodysty SCENE PROD SCENE SR:OD NO. DIRECTOR TAKE DATE RAMAN EXL INT SOUND BarttomiejSkowron Skowron Barttomiej'

topComments.text: A czy jest szansa aby po jakimś czasie grania epizodów, dostać szansę zagrania czegoś większego? Czy bez szkoły aktorskiej raczej nie ma szans?

items.text:
**WARSZAWA, PKiN / STATYŚCI**

**31.03.2026, ok. 6h nagrań**

**stawka: 100 pln** - płatne gotówką po zakończeniu zdjęć

Szukamy statystów do roli ławy przysięgłych i publiczności w dynamicznej scenie sądowej (reklama / short video). 
* kobiety i mężczyźni w różnym wieku (18–65)

items.text:
Hi everyone! We’re putting together a small independent film festival in Hollywood and wanted to invite fellow filmmakers, creatives, and anyone looking for something fun to come out.

This isn’t your typical sit-down-only screening — we’ve built it more as a full experience with:

🎬 Short film screenings
🍔 Food vendors
🍹 Bar
🎶 Live band + DJ
🎨 Interactive vendors & activations
🤝 Networking with other creatives

It’s also all-ages and family-friendly, with a lot of vendors and activities that keep kids entertained while adults can still enjoy the films, music, and atmosphere.

📍 Eastman Kodak Building (Hollywood)
📅 March 28

If you’re looking for something a little different from the usual film festival format, we’d love to have you there.

Feel free to message me for details!

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'IM Τια ANTHOLOGY io SHORT FILM FESTIVAL MARCH 28 SOLOTECH STUDIOS @ THE EASTMAN KODAK BUILDING 6700 SANTA MONICA BLVD. HOLLYWDOD, CA 90038'

message.text: Raj Kumar remains one of the most iconic figures in Indian cinema. Known for his deep voice, powerful dialogue delivery, and unmatched screen presence, he brought a rare intensity to every role. His unique style and fearless personality made him stand out in every film he appeared in. He wasn’t just acting—he was creating moments that audiences would remember forever.”###Rose’s##Teapot🎥🎥🎥🎥🎥📽️📽️📽️📽️📽️👌👌👌👌

items.text:
SHORT FILM CASTING 🚨

Surrealist drama, expected dates: 25th & 26th April 

WE HAVE CAST ARIA & OWEN, NOW ONLY LOOKING FOR ARIA'S MUM - preferably black but open to other ethnicities. 

PLEASE SHARE!!!!!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL SHORT FILM HALF 00 oar COAT WHAT BEGINS AS A 4 NORMAL CONVERSATION ON AN ORDINARY DAY TAKES AN UNEXPECTED TURN, LEAVING ARIA LOST IN WORLD OF HER OWN AND FORCED TO CONFRONT THE REALITY SHE HAS BEEN AVOIDING SINCE A RECENT TRAGEDY.'
May be a graphic of text

May be a graphic of tree and text that says 'MORE INFO SURREALIST DRAMA, 15-20 MINUTES LOCATION: LONDON (EXACT LOCATIONS TBC) F APRIL 24-26 (TBC) 3DAYS 3 DAYS DAYSOFSHOOTING OF SHOOTING UNPAID, FOOD & TRAVEL COVERED @HALFCOATPRODUCTIONS ON INSTAGRAM & YOUTUBE GET IN CONTACT IF INTERESTED IN BEING PART OF THE CREW! AUDITIONS Send headshots/showreels to halfcoatproductions@gmail.com For the roles of Aria & Aria's Mum, if we are interested we will send a small excerpt to beperformed & sent back to us by early-mid march.'

items.text:
🎬 Schauspielerin gesucht für Sitcom-Serie! 🎬
Wir sind aktuell mitten in den Dreharbeiten zu unserer Sitcom und suchen noch Verstärkung für unser Team!  

Wen wir suchen:  

- Frau, Alter: ca. 20–40 Jahre  

- Erscheinung: blond, blauäugig  

- Ausstrahlung: frech, humorvoll, locker drauf und natürlich mit Charakter  

- Erfahrung: nicht notwendig!  

Wichtig:  

- Du solltest zuverlässig sein  

- Wohnort idealerweise in der Nähe von Koblenz  

- Dreh findet jedes Wochenende statt  

- Projekt ist unbezahlt (no budget / unpaid)  

⚠️ Wichtig: Morgen ist bereits ein Drehtag – es wäre super, wenn wir bis dahin schon jemanden finden!  

Wenn du Lust hast, Teil eines kreativen Projekts zu werden und vor der Kamera zu stehen, dann melde dich gerne bei uns!  

📩 Schreib uns einfach eine DM mit ein paar Infos über dich (gerne auch mit Foto)!  

Wir freuen uns auf dich! 🎥✨

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text

topComments.text: Nehmt gern Kontakt zu Sanny4me aka Sandra Wötzel aka Sandras Social Media Creation, Redaktion und Moderation auf! ❤️

items.text:
CASTING CALL: Garnier Hair Campaign 

Women with gorgeous hair needed! ✨

We’re looking to connect with UK based millenial women (aged 30–45) who are loyal Garnier Olia users (women who have been using the product for 10+ years).

For this project, we’re specifically looking for someone with long, glossy hair (ideally dark/brunette) and a natural confidence on camera.

Fee: Standard day fee + £8000 buyout. (incl travel & expenses)
Location: This shoot will take place in Prague (mid-April, dates TBC)

If this sounds like you — or you know someone who fits the bill — tag your friend with the beautiful hair below

 To apply, please send:

– Your name, age and location

– A recent photo

– A short note on your experience using Garnier Olia

Email: casting@casperblackcasting.com

topComments.text: I have long red hair- but I’m a wheelchair user. Would that matter?
If you'd accept Garnier Nutrisse drop me a message

items.text:
CASTING ACTORS FOR FIGHT SCENE IN FEATURE FILM!!

Title: Saturdays

Genre: Thriller/Comedy

Logline: After accidentally taking a new designer drug on the way to a Halloween party, three broke nobodies become viral vigilantes in a city on the edge but their rise to infamy puts them in the cross-hairs of a charismatic cartel leader.

Role:

Carlos (30-50) High ranking cartel member

Hugo (30-50) High ranking cartel member

Knuckles (20-40) Drug packer

Diesel (20-40) Drug packer

Brick (20-40) Drug packer

Production Type: Indie

Production Company: Loste Films

Contact Information: luke@lostefilms.com

Run Time: Feature

Compensation: Catering/Crafty provided during proof of concept shoot. Compensation for future shoot dates is open to negotiation.

Audition Information: Send an email with headshot, resume and reel. Stunt experience preferred.

Shooting Schedule: March 28-29th. 11am call time both days.

Filming Location: Denver

Project Description: Saturdays is an upcoming feature film we’re currently shooting the beginning of to use as a proof of concept. The scenes in the proof of concept are still being used in the final movie, which will be shot later on in the year. We’re ideally looking for actors with stunt experience.

IMDB Link: [https://www.imdb.com/title/tt39423188/](https://www.imdb.com/title/tt39423188/)

items.text:
Hi everyone!
I’m looking for some career guidance regarding management.

1. Is it better to have one manager who handles both modeling and acting, or is it more effective to have specialized managers for each?

2. Does it make sense to have separate managers for different regions (LA, NY, Atlanta), or should one manager oversee everything?

topComments.text: If you want more help at understanding the best ways to get represented contact Zariah Cameron-Lovell She has a lot of knowledge to help you!

If you want work in a market, you need an agent in that market. Most people living in Colorado, if they want consistent acting work, are seeking agents and agencies in other markets (Utah, NM, Atlanta, LA, NY).  If you have a CO agent, even if you’re booking work, there is rarely enough work to make a living. Seeking agents in other markets can help you find work more consistently and allows you to be sent out or audition for more projects.

items.text:
Dear Friends, Actresses and actors - dear casting agencies and distributors - I'd like to inform you about my film project "Abi Nathan - The Voice of Peace". Abie Nathan was a bon vivant and a pacifist—he doesn't fit into any category," "And he was deeply inspired by the idea that peace between Israel and the Arab world is possible." But how do you reach people and convince them? With his own radio station—"The Voice of Peace." Starting in 1973, he sailed off the coast of Tel Aviv, outside of any state authority, broadcasting around the clock "From Somewhere in the Mediterranean," as the opening remarks read.

If you wish to be part of this important feature film, PLEASE SEND ME  our LATEST INFO´s

Your Harald Reichebner - the mail address is

h.reichebner@global-filmtime.de

🎭 **CASTING CALL: SINGLE & READY TO MINGLE**

We’re looking for talented actors to bring our faith-filled dramedy ***Single & Ready to Mingle: A Faith-Filled Experience*** to life.

Set at a Christian singles retreat, this story follows three women navigating love, faith, temptation, and second chances during one unforgettable weekend.

Think **sisterhood, secrets, laughter, and spiritual growth** — with a little romance and chaos along the way.

✨ Multiple roles available
✨ Faith-based dramedy series
✨ Strong, dynamic characters

**Ready to mingle?**

🎬 **Apply for casting —copy and paste link. **https://form.jotform.com/250552717627157

items.text:
[**Konstancin**; symbolicznie, ale płatne; **31 marca 2026**]

*Serwus!*

Do spotu dla organizacji pożytku publicznego, **poszukujemy:**
1. **kobiety w wieku około 25 - 30 lat **- do głównej roli - stawka w zależności od doświadczenia
2. **statystów w wieku 20 - 70 lat**, bez względu na płeć - **stawka 100 zł **

Chętnych zapraszam do **przesyłania zgłoszeń na adres casting.dnmk@gmail.com**. W mailu **proszę o:**
1. **odpowiednie zatytułowanie **"spot* - główna rola*" albo "*spot - statysta*", w zależności od roli.
2. **zawarcie aktualnych zdjęć całej sylwetki** 
3. **wskazanie dotychczasowego doświadczenia** - jeżeli się je posiada (nie jest konieczne)

Więcej szczegółów w korespondencji email.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of one or more people and people smiling

items.title: It's our summer yet? ☀️

items.text:
Ralf Scharrer im Kurzinterview, ein spontaner Medienmoment vor der heute-show 

Dieses kurze Interview mit Ralf ist in einem persönlichen Moment vor dem Studio entstanden, im Umfeld der heute-show und kurz vor unserem Bühnenmoment zur Folge vom 20. März. Für mich war das ein sympathisches, spontanes und pointiertes Gespräch, in dem sofort spürbar wurde, wie viel Präsenz, Charme und Schlagfertigkeit Ralf Scharrer mitbringt. 

Im Mittelpunkt stehen sein Name, seine öffentliche Wirkung, seine markante Ausstrahlung und genau die Leichtigkeit, mit der aus wenigen Sätzen ein unterhaltsamer Clip wird. 

Viele kennen Ralf Scharrer als Schauspieler, doch in diesem kurzen Ausschnitt zeigt sich vor allem auch seine persönliche Art, direkt, humorvoll und mit einem sicheren Gespür für Wirkung. Genau das macht solche kurzen Begegnungen für mich interessant. Sie sind ungeplant, nahbar und oft viel prägnanter als lange Gespräche. Gerade deshalb wollte ich diesen Moment festhalten und mit Dir teilen. 

Wenn Dir solche spontanen Interviewmomente aus dem Medienumfeld gefallen, freue ich mich über Deinen Kommentar, Dein Like und Dein Abo. Schreib mir gern, welcher Satz oder welcher Moment von Ralf Scharrer Dir in diesem Clip am meisten im Kopf geblieben ist. 

Danke, Christian Weiße aka Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Image- und Eventfilmproduktion  Inh. Christian Weiße 

#RalfScharrer #ChristianWeisse #heuteshow #ZDF #Interview #Schauspiel #Medienmoment #Köln #Kurzinterview #TVMoment 

Das gezeigte Kurzinterview entstand vor Beginn des Drehs in einem Flurbereich vor dem Studio im Umfeld der Produktion, zeigt keine vertraulichen Inhalte oder unzulässigen Bildmotive und dokumentiert ausschließlich einen persönlichen, eigenständig entstandenen Begegnungsmoment zwischen Christian Weiße und Ralf Scharrer.

items.summary:
Ralf Scharrer im Kurzinterview, ein spontaner Medienmoment vor der heute-show 

Dieses kurze Interview mit Ralf ist in einem persönlichen Moment vor dem Studio entstanden, im Umfeld der heute-show und kurz vor unserem Bühnenmoment zur Folge vom 20. März. Für mich war das ein sympathisches, spontanes und pointiertes Gespräch, in dem sofort spürbar wurde, wie viel Präsenz, Charme und Schlagfertigkeit Ralf Scharrer mitbringt. 

Im Mittelpunkt stehen sein Name, seine öffentliche Wirkung, seine markante Ausstrahlung und genau die Leichtigkeit, mit der aus wenigen Sätzen ein unterhaltsamer Clip wird. 

Viele kennen Ralf Scharrer als Schauspieler, doch in diesem kurzen Ausschnitt zeigt sich vor allem auch seine persönliche Art, direkt, humorvoll und mit einem sicheren Gespür für Wirkung. Genau das macht solche kurzen Begegnungen für mich interessant. Sie sind ungeplant, nahbar und oft viel prägnanter als lange Gespräche. Gerade deshalb wollte ich diesen Moment festhalten und mit Dir teilen. 

Wenn Dir solche spontanen Interviewmomente aus dem Medienumfeld gefallen, freue ich mich über Deinen Kommentar, Dein Like und Dein Abo. Schreib mir gern, welcher Satz oder welcher Moment von Ralf Scharrer Dir in diesem Clip am meisten im Kopf geblieben ist. 

Danke, Christian Weiße aka Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Image- und Eventfilmproduktion  Inh. Christian Weiße 

#RalfScharrer #ChristianWeisse #heuteshow #ZDF #Interview #Schauspiel #Medienmoment #Köln #Kurzinterview #TVMoment 

Das gezeigte Kurzinterview entstand vor Beginn des Drehs in einem Flurbereich vor dem Studio im Umfeld der Produktion, zeigt keine vertraulichen Inhalte oder unzulässigen Bildmotive und dokumentiert ausschließlich einen persönlichen, eigenständig entstandenen Begegnungsmoment zwischen Christian Weiße und Ralf Scharrer.
items.title: Ralf Scharrer im Kurzinterview, ein spontaner Medienmoment vor der heute-show

items.text:
Stimme • Herz • Show – Pur und Authentisch! 🎤✨

Wer mich kennt, weiß: Bei mir gibt es keine Maskerade und keine Drag-Show.

Ich stehe für 100% echtes Entertainment.

Das Besondere? Eine feminine Performance trifft auf meine natürliche, sonore Männerstimme. Ein Kontrast, der unter die Haut geht und bekannten Klassikern eine ganz neue Seele verleiht. 🎶

Egal ob:

✅ Kult & Legenden (Tribute Shows)
✅ Party & Energie (Schlager-Remixe & Pop)
✅ Gefühl & Tiefgang (Chansons & Liedermacher)

Ich bin weltweit für euch unterwegs – zu Lande, zu Wasser und überall dort, wo gute Musik und echte Emotionen gebraucht werden. 🌍🚢

Lust auf ein maßgeschneidertes Live-Erlebnis?

Schaut euch die Details im Flyer an oder schreibt mir direkt eine DM! 📩

#MathiasMarieKaiser #LiveGesang #eventhighlight #KreuzfahrtShow #transartist

EXTRAS CASTING CALL!!
Blessed Be the Fruit - Chapman University Dodge College AP Film

Producer: Sofia Caliento, Adam New

Director: Chloe Marlissa

Writer: Harold Fullilove III, Marissa Morales

Union Status: Not Applicable

Shoot Date(s): 04/10/2026 - 04/12/2026

Shoot Location: Orange, CA

Logline: When a masc lesbian discovers she’s pregnant despite never having slept with a man, she must navigate a supposed immaculate conception while clashing with her devout religious mother and the mounting pressure of society.

Character details:

Protesting extras :

Needed on: Saturday April 11th

Physical traits: Adults and college-aged 

Church going extras :

Needed on: Friday April 10th 

Physical traits: Adults and college-aged 

Reporter #3 :

Needed on: Friday April 10th 

Reports on the story of the "Lesbian Virgin Mary" with impressive professionalism.

Physical traits: Female, mid (30-early 40s or older)

*** If interested please email gsprecace@chapman.edu & chmok@chapman.edu your preferred role, a headshot, resume if applicable, and your availability 🙂 ***

sharedPost.text:
🎭 We’re so excited to share our upcoming production of The Good Doctor by Neil Simon, a witty and whimsical comedy inspired by the short stories of Anton Chekhov!

Directed by Meredith Sladek, this charming collection of stories is full of humor, heart, and unforgettable characters.

✨ Auditions are April 9, 10, and 11. Pay is a flat fee of $500.
🎟 Performances run June 19 to 21 and June 26 to 28, 2026, at Wagner College's Stage One

Interested in being part of the show? Check out this link for full audition details: https://sundogtheatre.org/opportunities/audition-notice-the-good-doctor/ 
We’d love to see you there!  [Graphic: Havoc Media]
~
#TheGoodDoctor #Auditions #CommunityTheatre #sundogtheatre
~
Susan Fenley Marjorie Hack Mark Giacalone Phyllis Guglietta Nicole Reid Christopher Chris Ferrera Lorna Harris Alex Tronolone Julie Desimone-Cadunzi Elyssa Paige Ellen Petillo Victoria Beddoe-Colella Melissa Holland Isabella Lucia

I’m making a short film for my university project.
I need 

2 males/queers 

1 female actor 

Age: 18-25 

Refreshments will be provided and travel costs will be covered. 

 Location : Kingston School of Art, Kingston 

Time: 26th of MARCH 

The film is about coping and adulting in a virtual production set made using unreal engine. 

For more details, message me or add my instagram. 

My personal email: ariktaverma@outlook.com

HELP A GIRL OUT PLS🙏

items.text:
🎭 CASTING CALL – SERAPHINE
for the musical *A Place Not Mine* (London)

We are looking for an actress to bring **Seraphine** to life in our new original musical, to be performed in **London on July 5th & 6th**.

✨ **About the role:**
Seraphine has a sweet, radiant energy. She always seems perfect — always smiling, always loved. But beneath that fairytale image lies a quiet sadness, and a growing realization that not everything is as pink as it seems.

🌟 **We are looking for someone with:**
• A warm, captivating stage presence
• Strong singing ability
• Blonde hair & light-colored eyes (a plus, not required)
• Musical theatre experience (a plus, not required)

📩 **To apply, please send:**
• A headshot
• A short vocal recording of ONE of the following:
– *“The Girl in the Bubble”* (*Wicked*)
– *“Almost There”* (*The Princess and the Frog*)

Email: **[emilvasilev296@gmail.com](mailto:emilvasilev296@gmail.com)**

📝 **Please note:**
This is an independent production created with passion and collaboration. While currently self-funded, any future income or sponsorship will be shared with the cast where possible.

💫 We are waiting for you!
If you have any questions, feel free to DM or email.

#CastingCall #MusicalTheatre #LondonActors #OpenCasting #TheatreLife #Auditions #NewMusical

sharedPost.text:
Most actor training takes time to reveal your habits.

Months. Sometimes years.
Scene after scene. Character after character.
Before you start to notice… “oh, I do that every time.”

Meisner flips that.

By stripping away text early on, we get straight to behaviour.
Straight to instinct. Straight to you.

Which means something very useful happens very quickly: We can see the difference between a character choice and your personal habits sneaking into everything. Once you can see it… you can do something about it. Not after ten more scenes. Now. In the room. Within weeks.

It’s efficient.
It’s direct.
It’s a little exposing.

And when this work is led by a deeply experienced, rigorously trained practitioner…that’s where Meisner becomes something else entirely.

Precise. Penetrative. Transformative.

On the other side of that?

More freedom. More range. More of you available to the work.

Next intake course starts 28th April. 
Train with us — www.bodymindvoice.co.uk

#meisnerlondon #actortraining #londonactor #londonactorsworkshop #londonactors

topComments.text:
Eliza Gwiazda – aktorka, influencerka i dziennikarka, ambasadorka kampanii Krewniacy, mama dzieci w wieku szkolnym.
To wszechstronna osobowość medialna, która z powodzeniem łączy świat show-biznesu z autentyczną komunikacją w mediach społecznościowych. Jako aktorka wyróżnia się naturalnością przed kamerą i umiejętnością wcielania się w różnorodne role – od lekkich, komediowych form po bardziej wyraziste, charakterystyczne kreacje.
Jako influencerka tworzy angażujące i estetyczne treści lifestyle’owe, modowe oraz rodzinne, które trafiają do szerokiego grona odbiorców. Jej profile to przestrzeń inspiracji – od codzienności mamy, przez kulisy eventów i pracy w mediach, aż po rekomendacje sprawdzonych produktów i usług.
Dziennikarskie doświadczenie pozwala jej prowadzić wywiady, relacje z wydarzeń oraz współpracować przy projektach medialnych z profesjonalizmem i swobodą. Świetnie odnajduje się na scenie, przed kamerą oraz w roli prowadzącej eventy.
Jako ambasadorka kampanii Krewniacy angażuje się społecznie, promując ideę pomagania i dzielenia się dobrem.
Prywatnie jest mamą dzieci w wieku szkolnym, co nadaje jej komunikacji autentyczności i bliskości – doskonale rozumie potrzeby współczesnych rodzin i potrafi o nich mówić w sposób naturalny, inspirujący i wiarygodny.
Współpracuje z markami w sposób kompleksowy – od tworzenia contentu (reels, posty, stories, TikTok), przez udział w kampaniach, po obecność na eventach i działania wizerunkowe. Jej atutem jest nie tylko zasięg, ale przede wszystkim wiarygodność, osobowość i umiejętność budowania relacji z odbiorcami.Eliza Gwiazda – aktorka, influencerka i dziennikarka, ambasadorka kampanii Krewniacy, mama dzieci w wieku szkolnym.

items.text:
**CHEKHOV WORLD THEATRE Summer Academy **

**July 12-18, 2026** in Hamburg 

**Michael Chekhov Acting Technique** meets

- **Organic Breathing** & **Image Work**

- **Kutiyattam Traditional Sanskrit Theatre** (Kerala, India) 

- **Physical Theatre and Dance** (Southeast Asia, India, Turkey) 

- **The Actor’s Energy and Presence **

- **Intercultural Theatre** in East Asia, India, Africa, and Europe 

Faculty: ***Jesper Michelsen***, Denmark; ***Remith Ramesh***, India; ***Gülhan Kadim***, Turkey; ***Yiğit Sertdemir***, Turkey; ***Suzana Nikolić***, Croatia; ***Ulrich Meyer-Horsch***, Germany; and guest artists from Southern Africa, Singapore, and India 

**TRAINING for PERFORMERS **

This annual intercultural encounter brings performance and training approaches from different continents and backgrounds into a practical exchange. You will intensively study the Michael Chekhov Acting Technique, and at the same time you will be in dialogue with other artistic traditions and performance techniques from around the globe. 

**INTERNATIONAL FESTIVAL**

There will be various workshop tracks in the morning and afternoon, followed by showcases, festival events and open classes in the evening. The daily training sessions can be combined so you will get a sense of each of the offered forms. 

The Summer Academy 2026 includes Michael Chekhov Europe’s Training Module 1: *Making Contact: Living Images*

Full announcement incl. application: **[[https://sfsh.de/international-summer-academy/sfsh10042/](https://sfsh.de/international-summer-academy/sfsh10042/?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAc3J0YwZhcHBfaWQQMjIyMDM5MTc4ODIwMDg5MgABHs3Du61hKx-Xu_1esnqI-ZLjbu4ix8Oehy_4URtXTvEGjvjthvv-xl6MV2bz_aem_MOHy7W1t_Klz6n0-wjRSIw)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsfsh.de%2Finternational-summer-academy%2Fsfsh10042%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAc3J0YwZhcHBfaWQQMjIyMDM5MTc4ODIwMDg5MgABHqtrNBt1FEZofEzNs9qJ3TfAeC5qwFl8aUzPE0tvnAwzuaqj6PYDcJoyacCN_aem_YVDUA2I-y0GQ1_9VFTtu7g&h=AT7kqcFpnROWzGn4vSx4Okbs9RnKRhVJzK01VC589zWbYmqlJkRq8GZ3f8W-9JLJRRYjVdyo6EF16dh97fg-dYu_vzKN6x50AcuzY3b0PUhrBO-76RYYOIFQkOhggQczaeNgiTWynDkD5YijE1vfCKrrZQ&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AT68kXhGbIoKHjjghX2NZOU70d2_5-uRTj1HivM_ABOYFBmFC6cXGiUf8DijJCcl1uVSZjBMy-mW2q_UgpcFKuNH5ADYXQ2IGSVQmfZhiLlPJDsAU33VWxRooP0SEqgV9YHKLtaz_o_mY3SVgRSkvVFrrc-YPzSAwaQZUT6UfnKgqeE)**

items.summary:
**CHEKHOV WORLD THEATRE Summer Academy **

**July 12-18, 2026** in Hamburg 

**Michael Chekhov Acting Technique** meets

- **Organic Breathing** & **Image Work**

- **Kutiyattam Traditional Sanskrit Theatre** (Kerala, India) 

- **Physical Theatre and Dance** (Southeast Asia, India, Turkey) 

- **The Actor’s Energy and Presence **

- **Intercultural Theatre** in East Asia, India, Africa, and Europe 

Faculty: ***Jesper Michelsen***, Denmark; ***Remith Ramesh***, India; ***Gülhan Kadim***, Turkey; ***Yiğit Sertdemir***, Turkey; ***Suzana Nikolić***, Croatia; ***Ulrich Meyer-Horsch***, Germany; and guest artists from Southern Africa, Singapore, and India 

**TRAINING for PERFORMERS **

This annual intercultural encounter brings performance and training approaches from different continents and backgrounds into a practical exchange. You will intensively study the Michael Chekhov Acting Technique, and at the same time you will be in dialogue with other artistic traditions and performance techniques from around the globe. 

**INTERNATIONAL FESTIVAL**

There will be various workshop tracks in the morning and afternoon, followed by showcases, festival events and open classes in the evening. The daily training sessions can be combined so you will get a sense of each of the offered forms. 

The Summer Academy 2026 includes Michael Chekhov Europe’s Training Module 1: *Making Contact: Living Images*

Full announcement incl. application: **[[https://sfsh.de/international-summer-academy/sfsh10042/](https://sfsh.de/international-summer-academy/sfsh10042/?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAc3J0YwZhcHBfaWQQMjIyMDM5MTc4ODIwMDg5MgABHs3Du61hKx-Xu_1esnqI-ZLjbu4ix8Oehy_4URtXTvEGjvjthvv-xl6MV2bz_aem_MOHy7W1t_Klz6n0-wjRSIw)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsfsh.de%2Finternational-summer-academy%2Fsfsh10042%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAc3J0YwZhcHBfaWQQMjIyMDM5MTc4ODIwMDg5MgABHqtrNBt1FEZofEzNs9qJ3TfAeC5qwFl8aUzPE0tvnAwzuaqj6PYDcJoyacCN_aem_YVDUA2I-y0GQ1_9VFTtu7g&h=AT7kqcFpnROWzGn4vSx4Okbs9RnKRhVJzK01VC589zWbYmqlJkRq8GZ3f8W-9JLJRRYjVdyo6EF16dh97fg-dYu_vzKN6x50AcuzY3b0PUhrBO-76RYYOIFQkOhggQczaeNgiTWynDkD5YijE1vfCKrrZQ&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AT68kXhGbIoKHjjghX2NZOU70d2_5-uRTj1HivM_ABOYFBmFC6cXGiUf8DijJCcl1uVSZjBMy-mW2q_UgpcFKuNH5ADYXQ2IGSVQmfZhiLlPJDsAU33VWxRooP0SEqgV9YHKLtaz_o_mY3SVgRSkvVFrrc-YPzSAwaQZUT6UfnKgqeE)**

TALENT SEARCH
Interested in film and TV?

We’re a new Manchester-based talent agency seeking young people and children from the North to join our books. We welcome everyone and celebrate individuality: just come as you are!

To apply, please have a parent or legal guardian contact us at apply@ourkidtalent.com, or check out our website [[www.ourkidtalent.com](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.ourkidtalent.com%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExV3lmYVpLWTFubmxGUHlOSnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR7EZsaknTT97EtdqB0csbLumG5din7d3PiUfsNOg8brcaY1cFR7OMk-gAWQ8g_aem_0dT2Io38x5Y8dBXBi9EBlA&h=AT6706FD1xFcr8VPaH2HBmo6-6NN8QmNTX4gdSGhGOz7FfBIX9W7u-AwyZCNuqoMts9TwryRabe4f3KwdcCYgMa9ub5tRR7EZNcnLQ2GzFE8ZhjeUlzd-gYLyVSxv0YR-LRXin1uxYanq9UVbEIlU60MiggIjvjMo7ZqcsvZocdzCvSGasbCs2m4ceIOgCteJGXMU5K8E0X1bf3qdF9BsH0llAfER89uOgfzVrSZMTPxu0Y4Bl8olGFb1FCso3400Cw&__tn__=-UK-R&c%5B0%5D=AT4YCpsf2Y26aU_9ZFZsIN1wWF567N9zElUPe6XV566Z5VuJg6L_eYSdryxAgqERq_LlUgw1sqoOWFWi0ZunFO19bEN9zfvo1roKTnXnEx-zerWrdfplytT_sY36pG4ntq1hoLN9a-avcyVEBaH_qtdezMymvkXwoLKHbI1y4LeEz5AUKpE)]

This is just a small glimpse into what it means to create something inspired by the greatness of Michael Jackson… If you want to see the real process, unfiltered and uncut… go to the link in my bio 🔗 and watch the full video on YouTube. (F_fusion Company)

Trust me, it's not what you expect… it's better.

🎥 @proyectoafra  @xi.production ✔️

items.text:
**CASTING CALL** - Australian TV Pilot "Next Big Thing". 

TV SHOW | COLLINGWOOD AREA | PAID

**Casting:**

Mateo - Male 21-26 (Must be able to sing)

Charlie - Male 20-25

**Date TBC:**

Mid-May, 3-4 filming days

**Chemistry read / Rehearsal:** 

Seddon

Next Big Thing is about young artists working to turn their passions into a reality. We follow a friend group of singers, actors and filmmakers as they navigate Melbourne’s Creative to try and become the ‘Next Big Thing’

This show will showcase all different kinds of young creatives, singers, actors, dancers, filmmakers and musicians, with musical performances taking place throughout the show to highlight the incredible young talent that Melbourne has to offer.

**If interested**, please email showreel and headshots to: level1203media@gmail.com

Please include your availability in Mid-May

You can also apply through Starnow using this link:

https://www.starnow.com/casting/pilot-project-next-big-thing-aussie-young-adult-tv-show-3126587/

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of ‎text that says '‎خممرق LEVEL1203 EL 1203 LEVEL Aussie TV Show/Pilot Show/ Pilot Next Big Thing mg CASTING CASTINGNOV NOW‎'‎

May be an image of text that says 'LEV LEVEL1203 EL 1203 Synopsis Casting" "Next Big Thing," a pilot project for an Aussie Young adult TV show. 'Next Big Thing' about young artists working to turn their passions into a reality. The show follows a friend group of singers, actors, and filmmakers as they navigate Melbourne's Creative to try and become the 'Next Big Thing' This show will showcase all different kinds of young creatives, singers, actors, dancers, filmmakers and musicians, with musical performances taking place throughout the show to highlight the incredible young talent that Melbourne has to offer.'
May be an image of text

May be an image of text that says 'LEVEL1203 1203 LEV Casting Call Allen 18-28 28 18 Early to Mid 20s. Allen is an aspiring filmmaker who's recentl graduated uni, yet keeps procrastinating on finishing off his student film by jumping on as many different projects as possible. Allen is chaotic neutral with an unpredictable silver tongue. His brain moves faster than his mouth and usually he'll say what he thinks without thinking it through properly, though it never comes from a place of malice and is just his own way of trying to be friendly by making everyone around him laugh.'

May be an image of text that says 'LEVEL1203 1203 Important Info Please send an email expressing your interest to level1203media@gmail.com, level120 level1203media( along with a CV and a Showreel if you have one. Please include which role you are applying for. Please include your availabilities in ay. We will then contact you with the audition sides and request a self-tape. Actors may also be asked to do an in-person audition and/or chemistry read. Shooting will be in the Collingwood area (TBC), in early May, 2026. This is a PAID project!'

items.text:
ACTING WORKSHOPS IN RUNCORN! 🎬
If you are interested in learning more about character development, to improve on improvisation, and gain valuable tools towards your acting skill set, then comment here.
I will be reviewing the amount of interest to establish a structured set of classes and single day workshops for actors local to the North West areas.
These classes will incorporate my 12 dramatic show reel scenes book, practicing character building and improvisation from the actors, to perform believable characters and deliver convincing performances. 
Any level of acting skill welcome! 18+ ages
#acting #actor #actingworkshop #northwest #characterisation #improvisation #drama

items.text:
CASTING CALL!!!

Deadline 5th April 2026

For an independent drama western short film

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'W ANTED Gasting Call Help us find Rob! Rob is a small man who tells big stories. He claims he's brushed shoulders with fame, power, and Hollywood prestige. Charming, playful, and quietly manipulative, he draws people in with the promise of opportunity. But beneath the surface, Rob is all smoke and no fire. items.text:
VRASP is expanding and we have a class for you.

Whether you are in London or Hampshire, VRASP is bringing professional screen acting training to your city and we want you in the room.

We are not a drama club. We are a screen acting school run by working industry professionals, and every class is designed to give you real, practical skills for film and TV. From your very first session you will be learning the same techniques used on professional sets, getting honest feedback, and building the kind of presence that gets you noticed on camera.

We currently have classes running in two locations:

London - Brixton
Adult Drop-In · Ages 18+ · £20 per session

Southampton — Hampshire
Adult Classes - From £15
Teen Class · Ages 13–17 · £20 per session

VRASP students gets access to:

Expert screen acting training from working industry professionals

Practical film and TV performance techniques

Camera confidence and on-screen presence coaching

Audition technique and self-tape preparation

Scene study, character work and emotional access.

Professional headshots and showreel footage through your training

VIP industry networking events.

Red carpet and industry events alongside founder Verona Rose and the wider VRASP Community.

VRASP was founded by Verona Rose - actress, writer, director and presenter, known for Netflix's Top Boy, BBC's Horrible Histories, BBC Three's Fully Blown and ITV2's Secret Crush. 

All abilities welcome. No experience needed. Just bring yourself and your ambition.
Find out more and book at www.vrasp.co.uk

‼️URGENT PAID CASTING CALL

Polish Male Voiceover for Car Brand Commercial

We’re currently searching for a native Polish male voiceover artist for an upcoming commercial project for a car brand.

This is a paid opportunity.
We’ll begin with a short audition to ensure we capture an authentic Polish voice, accurate pronunciation, and the perfect tone for our client’s creative brief.

Requirements:
• Native Polish speaker
• Male voice talent
• Natural, genuine delivery style
• Ability to self-record high-quality, clean audio

How to apply:
Submit your audition voice recording to:
wallinuk@hotmail.com

Thank you!

Mary

STEX Creative Agency

——

Script:

VO: Nie idź na kompromis. Jedź po więcej z MG ZS Hybrid+ !

VO: Dynamicznie i oszczędnie, z efektywnością Hybrydy

VO: I przestronnością SUV’a, z miejscem na każdy drobiazg oraz na nogi.

VO: Bo możliwości zaczynają się tam, gdzie kończą się kompromisy

VO: Teraz aż do 9 000 zł rabatu i kredyt 50/50 dla modeli MG ZS, HS i MG3.

items.text:
**Mini serial wojenny 1940 – Szukamy mężczyzny do roli żandarmerii państowej**

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów ‘’**Grupa1940**’’ poszukuje mężczyzny **w wieku 25 – 40 lat** **bez zarostu w obwodzie klatki 95 – 100 i pasie 90 – 100 o wzroście najlepiej 175 - 180 **do roli niemieckiego Schultzpolizei. Postać ta wystąpi w 3 scenach z czego w 2 będzie mieć kilka kwestii po niemiecku. Kostium będzie podobny do tego umieszczonego w załączniku.

** **

 Szukamy kogoś z **Gliwic lub okolic**: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej gdyż odległość do tej roli ma znaczenie. Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. Od maja do końca sieprnia  szykujemy się do kilku scen bitewnych z francuzami. Kilka postaci ma nieduże kwestie po niemiecku. **Mundur i wyposażenie jesteśmy w stanie pożyczać.**

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

attachments.ocrText: No photo description available.

items.text:
Hej, hej! 🙋‍♀️ CASTING DO REKLAMY SIECI SKLEPÓW🐭 

Rusza pozytywny , kolorowy casting do nowej reklamy popularnej sieci sklepów– a MY szukamy wyjątkowych dzieciaków! 💛

👧👦 KOGO SZUKAMY?

• dzieci w wieku 8–12 lat

• dziewczynki i chłopcy

• wszystkie typy urody i sylwetki

• dzieci o różnym pochodzeniu etnicznym

Szczególnie mile widziane są także dzieci:

• z lekką nadwagą

• z aparatem na zębach

• z odstającymi uszami

• o nietypowej, charakterystycznej urodzie

❤️Najważniejsze: osobowość, naturalność i charakter!❤️

Poniżej znajdziecie najważniejsze informacje ⚠️ 

• Recall odbywa się wyłącznie na żywo – obecność obowiązkowa ❗ Lokalizacja: WARSZAWA

• Nie ma możliwości recallu online ❗ 

• Brak karty aktorskiej – nie jest wymagana❗ 

📅 TERMINY

• 30.03 (do godz. 8:00) – deadline na przesłanie zgłoszeń

• 03.04 – recall (na żywo)

• 09.04 – przymiarki

• 10.04 – dzień zdjęciowy

🎥 MATERIAŁY CASTINGOWE

Prosimy o nagranie:

1. Wizytówki
Krótko opowiedz coś o sobie 😊

2. Scenki naturalnej aktywności przy biurku, np.: rysowanie , układanie LEGO, puzzle, memory 🍀

👉 Ważne: 

 🤩 nagranie blisko (półzbliżenie) – tak, aby dobrze było widać twarz PLUS standardowo naturalność i swoboda – bez aktorstwa „na siłę”, dajmy dzieciom się pokazać w ich naturalnym wyczuciu ! 🍓☺️👌

Czekamy na Wasze zgłoszenia! 💌

Zapraszamy do aplikowania:

MAILOWO 👉 casting@unagimedia.pl / tytuł: 009

Pamiętajcie, że każde zgłoszenie powinno zawierać: imię, nazwisko, wiek, miejscowość, doświadczenie, zdjęcie portretowe oraz sylwetki (wyraźne, bez okularów, nakryć głowy, na jednolitym tle), wizytówkę dziecka, scenkę, wymiary: wzrost, rozmiar ubrania oraz obuwia (fajnie gdybyście umieścili również wymiary szczegółowe czyli: klatka piersiowa, pas, biodra)⭐️

To świetna okazja na pierwszą (lub kolejną!) przygodę przed kamerą ✨

Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi osobami, 

P O W O D Z E N I A !❤️

items.text:
**Casting Call - Volunteer, Non-union, IMDB credit, Snippet**

I'm casting for a comedy film- Vijay Finds His Dating Mojo. I plan to send this film to film festivals and use it as a proof of concept for a feature film.

**Synopsis-** An immigrant from India, Vijay, takes services from a manipulative dating coach, Jason. After several failures, Vijay decides to discard pickup lines and pretensions and be himself. He meets Sophia, and they hit it off. Will him being honest work out or backfire?

Who applied for other characters can submit their audition by 25th March. 

**Casting:**

Vijay's Father- 45-65, conservative, Southasian. shoot on 11th April.

Vijay's Mother- 45-65, conservative, Southasian. Shoot on 11th April.

Vijay's date- 35-45, Normal to higher weight, any ethnicity. Shoot on 12th April.

**Location:** Vancouver Downtown and Kitsilano

**Date:** 11th and 12th April, 2026

**Pay:** Volunteer, IMDB credit, Snippet

**To Apply:**
Please email **tomar.gautam2@yahoo.com** with:
• Resume
• Headshots
• Demo reel (if available)

Subject line: **“Character and your name”**

items.text:
**OPEN CASTING CALL**
**キャスティング募集のお知らせ**

**SEEKING JAPANESE SPEAKING, JAPANESE PEOPLE**
**日本語が話せる、日本人の方を募集しています**

Casting Directors, Colleen Bolton and Maureen Webb are 
**seeking Japanese speaking people for MAJOR TV SERIES**.
No Acting Experience Necessary! Shooting in the Vancouver area.

キャスティングディレクターのコリーン・ボルトンおよびモーリーン・ウェッブは、**大手テレビシリーズに出演する日本語が話せる**
**日本人の方を募集しています。**演技経験は不要です！
撮影はバンクーバー近郊で行われます。

**Requirements:**
* Japanese-Canadians or Japanese born people 
* Must be a native and fluent Japanese speaker without an English accent 
* Open gender
* 18 – 70 years of age
* Paid opportunity (per UBCP)
* No acting experience required
* Must be based in Vancouver, BC (or the Lower Mainland)
* Must be a Canadian citizen, permanent resident, or have valid work permit

**応募条件：**
* 日系カナダ人、または日本生まれの方
* 英語訛りのない、ネイティブレベルで日本語が堪能な方
* 性別は問いません
* 18歳～70歳
* 報酬あり（UBCP規定に基づく）
* 演技経験は問いません（未経験OK）
* バンクーバーBC州（またはローワーメインランド）在住の方
* カナダ市民、永住権保持者、または有効なワーキングビザをお持ちの方

Performers with agents or performers who have auditioned for Colleen Bolton or Maureen Webb in the last 3 months NEED NOT APPLY. 
エージェントに所属している方、または過去3ヶ月以内にコリーン・ボルトンまたはモーリーン・ウェッブのオーディションを受けた方はご応募いただけません。

**If interested please submit your information to this Google Form:**

[https://forms.gle/T1YdzDCc7BhwxHk38](https://forms.gle/T1YdzDCc7BhwxHk38)

**ご興味のある方は、以下のGoogleフォームよりご応募ください：**

[https://forms.gle/T1YdzDCc7BhwxHk38](https://forms.gle/T1YdzDCc7BhwxHk38)

If you have any questions please email Casting Assistant, June Fukumura at [junefukumura@castawayproduction.com](mailto:junefukumura@castawayproduction.com) 

ご質問がある場合は、キャスティングアシスタントの福村じゅんまでメールでお問い合わせください [junefukumura@castawayproduction.com](mailto:junefukumura@castawayproduction.com)

items.text:
SAT 28TH MARCH. NON-SPEAKING EXTRAS NEEDED FOR A COMEDY SHORT FILM, “Who the F*** is Bill?” 🍩 

Hi!!!! I hope you are all well. 

My production group at the University of Salford is looking for ANYONE AGED 30+ to be non-speaking extras in Manchester that can be apart of a days shooting on SATURDAY 28TH MARCH. 

This scene is set in an AA meeting - so you will be sat around in a circle of chairs. Ability to gasp, pull a good facial expression and be apart of a group hug is NECESSARY. Should be a laugh?!

This is an unpaid position - unfortunately as students without funding from the University we do not have the means to pay actors😔 Food and drink provided and we will give you a cheeky shoutout in the credits!!

Pop an email to me at eviecox111@gmail.com if you are interested!!

items.text:
CASTING CALL – STUDENT MUSIC VIDEO (UNPAID)

Hi, I’m a student filmmaker producing a narrative-based music video for a coursework project. I’m currently casting for two main roles in a cinematic piece focused on love, memory, and heartbreak.

⸻

PROJECT CONCEPT

The music video explores a relationship that has fallen apart, shown through a mix of present-day scenes and emotional flashbacks. The narrative follows the female lead as she reflects on memories of the relationship, while the male lead appears both in real-time and within these flashbacks. The visuals will contrast warm, happy memories with colder, distant present moments.

⸻

📍 LOCATION

I am looking towards South West London, roughly around the ends of Hampton, Teddington, Kingston and Twickenham.

SHOOT DATE

I am trying to record my music video on the 28th of March which is the Saturday. If needed to record some other time, plans can be possibly changed.

 TIME COMMITMENT

Approximately 3–5 hours (half-day shoot)

⸻

 ROLES AVAILABLE

Female Lead (16–20)
 • Main focus of the narrative
 • Portrays emotional journey from love to heartbreak
 • Strong facial expressions needed (subtle + emotional acting)
 • Appears in both present-day scenes and flashback memories
 • Must be comfortable with close-up, cinematic shots

Male Lead (16–20)
 • Plays partner in the relationship
 • Appears in romantic flashbacks (happy, intimate moments)
 • Also appears distant/withdrawn in present-day scenes
 • Needs to show contrast between warmth (past) and detachment (present)

(No professional experience required – students and beginners welcome)

⸻

 WHAT YOU’LL GET

* High-quality footage for your showreel
* Full credit in the final music video
* Experience working on a structured filmed project

⸻

 TRAVEL

Travel expenses are not covered, so please only apply if you are able to travel to the location.

⸻

 COSTUME & STYLE

Female Lead:
 • Flashback scenes: soft, warm-toned outfits (light colours, dresses, casual cute styling)
 • Present scenes: darker, muted clothing (hoodies, neutral tones) to reflect mood

Male Lead:
 • Flashback scenes: casual, relaxed outfits (simple t-shirts, light colours)
 • Present scenes: darker or plain clothing to reflect emotional distance

(Actors may be asked to bring their own outfits based on this guidance) Further details will be provided for costume and style when I receive applicants.

⸻

HOW TO APPLY

DM me with:
 • Name + age
 • Recent photo or Instagram
 • Any acting experience (optional)

Shortlisted applicants will receive more details including storyboard, shot list, and exact filming plan.

message.text:
THE RESULTS ARE IN!🤠These kids are incredibly talented, but most importantly, have great character. They were extremely respectful during the entire process, and very humble. I am impressed! What an honor it was to work with you mini professionals. Thank you for helping my vision come to LIFE! 🙌🏼✨❤️

Now…comment down below what you want to see next! 👇🏻🤔 

Film/sound design : @westwebb_ 
Choreography: @madeline.jayne 

#photoshoot #videoedit #dancers #viral #reels #baileyzimmerman #lukecombs #karaxlewis #fyp #dance #photography #countrymusic #USA

items.text:
Appelsinkager der smelter i munden

Ingredienser:

2 æg
80 g sukker
120 ml solsikkeolie
1 tsk vaniljeekstrakt
Skal af 1 appelsin (appelsinskal)
300 g hvedemel
1 tsk bagepulver
.. Jeg tilbyder jer denne opskrift i bytte for et simpelt "Mums" i kommentarerne
"Jeg skal sige noget for at blive ved med at få mine opskrifter... Tak.

items.text:
Den, der lagde opskriften på appelsinfluff med græsk yoghurt op, er et geni! Min mand og jeg kan ikke få nok. Selvom jeg hader græsk yoghurt, køber jeg det, som om jeg var en professionel 2-ingrediens dejbager.
Jeg må lige sige noget for at blive ved med at få mine opskrifter.... Tak.. Opskrift i første kommentar.

items.text:
📍 MALLORCA: NORTH ZONE — ALCÚDIA / CALA RATJADA 

🎭 PERFORMERS, DANCERS & ENTERTAINERS — BANANA CLUB

📆 Season: May – September 2026

Do you have the talent, creativity and energy to light up the night?

Banana Club is looking for performers, dancers and entertainers to bring our themed nights to life and create unforgettable experiences all season long.

✅ WHAT WILL YOU DO?

• Perform choreographies and interact directly with the crowd  

• Bring themed characters to life  

• Elevate VIP experiences with presence and professionalism  

• Work closely with other artists and the creative team  

✅ WHAT ARE WE LOOKING FOR?

• Having a work permit for the EU is vital.

• Proven experience (CV + photos/videos)  

• English and Spanish (international audience)  

• Energy, commitment and adaptability  

• Extra skills (acro, pole, fire, etc.) are a plus  

👉 Apply here: https://www.bananaclub.es/es/jobs

············································

📍 ZONA NORTE — ALCÚDIA / CALA RATJADA (Mallorca)

🎭 ARTISTAS, BAILARINES Y ANIMADORES — BANANA CLUB

📆 Temporada: Mayo – Septiembre 2026

¿Tienes talento, creatividad y energía para hacer vibrar la noche?

En Banana Club buscamos animadores, bailarines y performers para dar vida a nuestras noches temáticas y crear experiencias inolvidables durante toda la temporada.

✅ ¿QUÉ HARÁS?

• Coreografías y animaciones con interacción directa con el público  

• Interpretación de personajes en noches temáticas  

• Apoyo a experiencias VIP con presencia y profesionalidad  

• Trabajo en equipo con otros artistas y el equipo creativo  

✅ ¿QUÉ BUSCAMOS?

• Experiencia demostrable (CV + fotos/vídeos)  

• Español e inglés (público internacional)  

• Energía, compromiso y adaptación  

• Se valoran habilidades como acrobacia, pole, fuego, etc.  

👉 Aplica aquí: https://www.bananaclub.es/es/jobs

items.text:
We are looking for talented female dancers for exciting upcoming projects across films, commercials, music videos & live events 💃🔥  

📍 Location: Mumbai, India  
📅 Duration: 6 Months (Starting April)  

If you’ve got passion, confidence & killer performance energy — we want YOU! 🌟  

📩 Apply Now:  
Send your CV, contact details & recent photos/videos to:  
📧 periwinkleproduction25@gmail.com  
📱 WhatsApp: +91 9167530767  

👉 Tag a dancer who shouldn’t miss this opportunity!  
👉 Share this & spread the word!  

#CastingCall #newzealand #ireland #irish #poland #germany #milan #italy #argentina #Cuba #latin #brazil #belarus #ukraine #london

items.text:
CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM: DEAR OLIVIA
(NON-Union)
We are casting supporting roles for our upcoming psychological thriller short film “Dear Olivia.”

This is an independent passion project and the first production our team is creating, so all roles are currently unpaid. However, we plan to continue making projects and actors involved may have opportunities for future paid roles in upcoming productions.

We’re looking for passionate actors who want to collaborate, build their reel, and be part of something creative.

ROLES
LIAM

Male | Mid 20s – Early 30s

Liam appears at first to be friendly, charming, and dependable — the kind of neighbor everyone trusts. He’s physically fit, confident, and has an easygoing personality that puts people at ease.

However, beneath the surface there is something off and unsettling. Liam hides a darker side that slowly reveals itself as the story progresses.

Character traits

Charismatic and approachable

Physically fit / athletic presence

Calm and controlled demeanor

Capable of shifting from warm and friendly to deeply unsettling

This role requires an actor comfortable portraying subtle psychological tension and a darker transformation.

===================================================
TITA RITA (Filipino preffered / Asian)

Female | 40s – 60s

Tita Rita is Olivia’s loud, loving, and slightly nosy aunt-like neighbor. She’s energetic, opinionated, and always trying to play matchmaker.

She brings light comedic energy to the story — teasing Olivia about relationships, gossiping, and trying to set her up with potential suitors.

Character traits

Warm and outgoing personality

Playful and talkative

Slightly dramatic and humorous

Gives strong “fun aunt” energy

This role adds warmth and humor before the story takes a darker turn.

===================================================
GRANDPA ROGER

Male | 65+

Grandpa Roger is a sweet elderly man who has known Olivia for years. He’s kind, gentle, and affectionate toward her.

He is preparing to move into a care home, which is why Liam is helping him.

Character traits

Kind and grandfatherly

Soft-spoken and warm

Gentle presence

He has poor eyesight, and slightly forgetful

This is a small but meaningful role that adds emotional warmth to the story.

***** please email us your Photo and Bio *****
please send us a photo of you (Mug shot)
===tmbyn.studios@gmail.com===

items.text:
Hi, all.
My names Safiya I’m a third year student studying journalism but I also do acting. For my course I’m doing a short form podcast titled the “reality of pursuing acting”.

This would be questions related conversations on what it’s like to pursue acting from different perspectives.
 
Im looking to speak to:
1.) A actor who has or is in acting/drama school
2.)A actor who hasn’t been to acting school but is pursuing acting 
3.) A drama, acting or theatre coach/teacher 
4.) Casting director

Anyone can get in touch via facebook messenger or my email Safiya.warrior@hotmail.co.uk

I can send you more details on what this entails but that is the general bases.

Thank you!

items.title: Hi, all.

items.text:
ACTORS!

I will review your self tape or showreel within 24 hours and come back to you with in depth notes and directions on how to improve it and make it stand out with casting directors.

ALL BOOKINGS ARE STRICTLY CONFIDENTIAL AND ALL MEDIA WILL BE DELETED AFTER THE BOOKING IS OVER.

I have been acting for 31 years, since I was 5, and in that time I have performed in West End, fringe theatre, off west end, tours, cruise ships, blockbuster films, feature films, short films and everything in between.
I have also been a casting director for the last 10 years, and have owned my own theatre and film production company for the last 4 years, so I have been involved in auditions from both sides of the table. I am also a well established writer/director and producer of theatre and film.

Needless to say, I’ve learned a few things.

No one ever teaches you how to properly record/edit a self tape, or what the most effective order all your clips should go in for your showreel, so that’s what I’m doing.

Ive also taken into account that most of us actors can’t afford hundreds of pounds on this services, so my review with two free reviews are only £20.

That’s it.

Book your slot here - https://distortedrebels.com/actor-resources/ols/products/showreelself-tape-review

I look forward to helping you!

Phoenix 🫶🏻

items.text:
CASTING / BACKGROUND ACTORS 

22/03/26

CONCRETE FISH

**Logline **A hypnotic experimental short about exploration, vulnerability and community

**Small synopsis **A strange fish girl bursts through the water and stumbles into an alternative rave where she gets a hefty taste of the human experience.

Email: estheralli@outlook.com or mhmollie0303@icloud.com 

* **Shooting 3rd- 7th April E8 2PB**
* **Travel Expenses Paid**
* Graduate film hoping to go to festivals
* Holding online auditions.   
*  **SPHYNX** (Female, 19-24, Any ethnicity) 
   * Fresh out the closet sapphic, in a relationship with Lia. Adjusting to being open with her sexuality, still very insecure and anxious. 
* **KEITH** (19-25, Male, Any ethnicity)
   * Regular lad, slightly airheaded, means well and is easy going. Must be open to getting a small flash tattoo on camera. 
* **NAT** (22-26, Male, Any ethnicity)
   * Sleazy, typical “macho man”. Quick to anger, prone to violence.Big ego, little emotional maturity. Must be comfortable with basic fighting choreography and basic dance choreography. 
* **WELLY** (22-26, Male, Any ethnicity)
*  Friends with NAT, slightly less sleazy but still complicit. Must be comfortable with basic fighting choreography and basic dance choreography. 

If you'd like to see some visual concepts from the pitch click this link [https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1v8Zly_Ns4p4-30AqNbSnLaqCBxjuOOs7/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=111701811464739879701&rtpof=true&sd=true](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1v8Zly_Ns4p4-30AqNbSnLaqCBxjuOOs7/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=111701811464739879701&rtpof=true&sd=true)

items.text:
🎬✨ Calling All Movie Lovers & BiG Dreamers ✨🎬

If you love movies… this is for You.

Whether you're into Acting, Storytelling, Filmmaking, or you just LOVE sittin in the Cinema gettin lost in a great film (like The Shawshank Redemption)… you’re invited 🎥🍿

We’ve created DBA aka DREAM BiG ARTiSTs Social Club:
A Fun, Lighthearted Community where we:

🍿 Go to the movies together
🎬 Organize regular cinema nights (twice a month)
🥂 Hang out, relax & connect
🤝 Meet Creatives, Artists & Great People
🍓 Share smoothies, simple foods & good vibes
💡 Enjoy fun, casual talks & ideas (nothing heavy)

No pressure. No cost. No expectations. Come as you are, Being You♥️

Just a space for people who love movies, creativity, and great energy.

So if you’ve ever gone to the cinema alone… or wished you had people to share that experience with…

This is your sign 👇

Join the group & come watch with us 🎥✨

items.text:
**Casting-Ausschreibung – Darstellerin gesucht (Filmszene, nicht öffentlich)**

Für den Dreh einer **Filmszene** suchen wir eine **Darstellerin (blond)** im Alter von **20 bis ca. 35 Jahren**.

**Wichtig: Nutzung / Veröffentlichung**
* Die Szene ist **ausschließlich für ein Lokal im Ausland** bestimmt
* **Keine Veröffentlichung** im **Internet**, **TV** oder auf öffentlichen Plattformen

**Dreh-Inhalt**
* Szene in **verschiedenen sexy Kostümen**
* Professioneller Dreh, klarer Ablauf

**Drehorte**
* **Sachsen** (1 Szene)
* **Kempten im Allgäu** (1 Szene)

**Vergütung**
* **400 € pro Drehtag** (jeweils **halber Tag**)

**Anonymität möglich**
* Auf Wunsch **ohne Gesicht** drehbar
* Alternativ: Gesicht wird **nachträglich per KI ersetzt**, wenn du anonym bleiben möchtest

**Bewerbung**
Bitte Bewerbung **per PN** mit:
* 2–4 aktuellen Fotos
* Alter, Größe, Wohnort
* Verfügbarkeit (Sachsen und/oder Kempten)
* Hinweis, ob du **anonym** drehen möchtest

[#Casting](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/casting?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZYFkO8uQYB9Mb1KI96GeDHRRCA-k9byXrE9aIqj95Wxkoc03GrE2gcXirTvO5IhhklAxlC516hRgbpXWmgwfdRHVRMYmKtis1BVD7L5nbI1sLRFtKMtwyvHNUo_gVRhBc0kQjqNr3eiTcGxhChWy2An&__tn__=*NK-R) [#Modeljob](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/modeljob?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZYFkO8uQYB9Mb1KI96GeDHRRCA-k9byXrE9aIqj95Wxkoc03GrE2gcXirTvO5IhhklAxlC516hRgbpXWmgwfdRHVRMYmKtis1BVD7L5nbI1sLRFtKMtwyvHNUo_gVRhBc0kQjqNr3eiTcGxhChWy2An&__tn__=*NK-R) [#Filmdreh](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/filmdreh?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZYFkO8uQYB9Mb1KI96GeDHRRCA-k9byXrE9aIqj95Wxkoc03GrE2gcXirTvO5IhhklAxlC516hRgbpXWmgwfdRHVRMYmKtis1BVD7L5nbI1sLRFtKMtwyvHNUo_gVRhBc0kQjqNr3eiTcGxhChWy2An&__tn__=*NK-R) [#Kempten](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/kempten?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZYFkO8uQYB9Mb1KI96GeDHRRCA-k9byXrE9aIqj95Wxkoc03GrE2gcXirTvO5IhhklAxlC516hRgbpXWmgwfdRHVRMYmKtis1BVD7L5nbI1sLRFtKMtwyvHNUo_gVRhBc0kQjqNr3eiTcGxhChWy2An&__tn__=*NK-R) [#Sachsen](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/sachsen?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZYFkO8uQYB9Mb1KI96GeDHRRCA-k9byXrE9aIqj95Wxkoc03GrE2gcXirTvO5IhhklAxlC516hRgbpXWmgwfdRHVRMYmKtis1BVD7L5nbI1sLRFtKMtwyvHNUo_gVRhBc0kQjqNr3eiTcGxhChWy2An&__tn__=*NK-R) [#Gage](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/gage?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZYFkO8uQYB9Mb1KI96GeDHRRCA-k9byXrE9aIqj95Wxkoc03GrE2gcXirTvO5IhhklAxlC516hRgbpXWmgwfdRHVRMYmKtis1BVD7L5nbI1sLRFtKMtwyvHNUo_gVRhBc0kQjqNr3eiTcGxhChWy2An&__tn__=*NK-R)

items.text:
VRASP is expanding and we have a class for you.

Whether you are in London or Hampshire, VRASP is bringing professional screen acting training to your city and we want you in the room.

We are not a drama club. We are a screen acting school run by working industry professionals, and every class is designed to give you real, practical skills for film and TV. From your very first session you will be learning the same techniques used on professional sets, getting honest feedback, and building the kind of presence that gets you noticed on camera.

We currently have classes running in two locations:

London - Brixton
Adult Drop-In · Ages 18+ · £20 per session

Southampton — Hampshire
Adult Classes - From £15
Teen Class · Ages 13–17 · £20 per session

VRASP students gets access to:

Expert screen acting training from working industry professionals

Practical film and TV performance techniques

Camera confidence and on-screen presence coaching

Audition technique and self-tape preparation

Scene study, character work and emotional access.

Professional headshots and showreel footage through your training

VIP industry networking events.

Red carpet and industry events alongside founder Verona Rose and the wider VRASP Community.

VRASP was founded by Verona Rose - actress, writer, director and presenter, known for Netflix's Top Boy, BBC's Horrible Histories, BBC Three's Fully Blown and ITV2's Secret Crush. 

All abilities welcome. No experience needed. Just bring yourself and your ambition.
Find out more and book at www.vrasp.co.uk

Everyone has a story in the river city. 

When the lives of several individuals intersect, tales centered around tragedy, love, and the trials and triumphs of the human condition come together in this touching and relatable film highlighting the everyday lives of those navigating through the city of Harrisburg, PA.

Click the link for the trailer!

https://www.facebook.com/share/v/1CkoGwsamx/

items.text:
**Open Call — The New Symposium**

The New Symposium invites applications from artists and practitioners working across music and related artistic disciplines —

Participants form an **interdisciplinary working group** and** develop their practice in dialogue with an international community **and **participate at the 6th edition of the Bled Contemporary Music Week!**

As an ongoing international forum and residency program, it creates a space for artistic development through weekly online exchange, cross-disciplinary collaboration, and long-term peer learning — more about the program: [https://thenewsymposium.com/description/](https://thenewsymposium.com/description/)

Apply **before March 31**, to join the program in April and festival in June —

[https://www.instagram.com/institut.abeceda/](https://www.instagram.com/institut.abeceda/)

sharedPost.text:
💃 MODEL CASTING CALL 🏎️
​Regals & Runways is looking for models to pair with the most iconic rides in Rochester for the ULTIMATE Car & Fashion Experience, Sunday, August 16th, 2026! This event is the perfect fusion of classic soul, high-octane gears, and retro fashion...fun for the whole family! 

​📍 CASTING CALL DETAILS:
​DATE: Sunday, April 12th, 2026
​TIME: 2:00 PM – 4:00 PM
​LOCATION: 52 Rochester Public Market, Rochester, NY
HOW TO DRESS: All black attire, heels, & photo ready hair/makeup

​🏁 WHO WE NEED:
​ALL shapes, sizes, ages, and backgrounds. All men, women, and children are welcome—no experience required, just bring your good vibes and strut your stuff! 

🗣️ NOTE: Anyone UNDER 18 years of age will require parent/guardian consent to participate. Parents/Guardians must be present for casting, shoot(s), and/or show if casted. 

👀 ALL Models selected will be invited to a FREE Makeup Class hosted by THE Aud Makeup Artist (yours truly 💁‍♀️) 
*Details to be released at a later time. 

Who's ready to join the movement? Drop a 🔥 if we'll see you there! 

📸: @hoytephoto
Designs & Concept: @xstravagance_designs
#MakeupByAud

items.text:
🎭 CASTING CALL – SERAPHINE
for the musical *A Place Not Mine* (London)

We are looking for an actress to bring **Seraphine** to life in our new original musical, to be performed in **London on July 5th & 6th**.

✨ **About the role:**
Seraphine has a sweet, radiant energy. She always seems perfect — always smiling, always loved. But beneath that fairytale image lies a quiet sadness, and a growing realization that not everything is as pink as it seems.

🌟 **We are looking for someone with:**
• A warm, captivating stage presence
• Strong singing ability
• Blonde hair & light-colored eyes (a plus, not required)
• Musical theatre experience (a plus, not required)

📩 **To apply, please send:**
• A headshot
• A short vocal recording of ONE of the following:
– *“The Girl in the Bubble”* (*Wicked*)
– *“Almost There”* (*The Princess and the Frog*)

Email: **[emilvasilev296@gmail.com](mailto:emilvasilev296@gmail.com)**

📝 **Please note:**
This is an independent production created with passion and collaboration. While currently self-funded, any future income or sponsorship will be shared with the cast where possible.

💫 We are waiting for you!
If you have any questions, feel free to DM or email.

#CastingCall #MusicalTheatre #LondonActors #OpenCasting #TheatreLife #Auditions #NewMusical

items.text:
Due to popular demand we are excited to announce the return of Monologue Mastery!

This 6-week online course for ages 14 - 18 years is designed to sharpen on-screen technique, exploring emotional truth through monologue work. Refining performance skills while also giving students the opportunity to write and develop their own original material. 

📅 Course start date is MONDAY 13TH APRIL

⏰ Sessions run for 90 minutes every Monday evening

Limited places available. £70 total price for the course.

Email us today to secure a place - classes@mcaa.co.uk

https://cherrypipsacting.co.uk/

items.text:
🎬 OD ZERA DO PLANU FILMOWEGO
Praktyczny przewodnik epizodysty

Chcesz spróbować swoich sił na planie filmowym, ale nie wiesz od czego zacząć?
A może byłeś już na planie i czujesz, że działasz trochę po omacku?

👉 Ten poradnik powstał, żebyś nie musiał uczyć się wszystkiego metodą prób i błędów.

💡 To wiedza od praktyka – nie teoria

Nazywam się Bartłomiej Skowron.
Zaczynałem od zera – bez znajomości, bez szkoły aktorskiej.

Wcześniej przez lata byłem w wojsku.
Dopiero później podjąłem decyzję, żeby zmienić życie i spróbować swoich sił na planie filmowym.

Dziś mam na koncie:
✔ ponad 100 projektów
✔ epizody w serialach i filmach (w tym produkcje Netflix)
✔ współpracę z rozpoznawalnymi aktorami
✔ doświadczenie, które zebrałem „od środka”
https://filmpolski.pl/fp/index.php?osoba=11200011
https://www.filmweb.pl/person/Bart%C5%82omiej+Skowron-2973719
https://www.imdb.com/name/nm13121784/?ref_=fn_t_1

👉 Ten poradnik to dokładnie to, czego sam potrzebowałem na starcie.

📘 Co znajdziesz w środku?

✔ Wstęp – jak wygląda prawdziwy początek
✔ Czym jest praca epizodysty w praktyce
✔ Moja historia – od wojska do planu
✔ Czy to jest dla Ciebie? (bez ściemy)
✔ Jak zacząć – pierwsze realne kroki
✔ Casting – jak to wygląda naprawdę
✔ Pierwszy dzień na planie – instrukcja przetrwania
✔ Zasady niepisane na planie
✔ Pieniądze, umowy i realia finansowe
✔ Co dalej – rozwój i możliwości
✔ Najczęstsze pytania i sytuacje kryzysowe

📖 Ponad 100 stron konkretnej wiedzy

Bez lania wody.
Bez motywacyjnych bajek.
Tylko realia tej branży.

🎥 Dlaczego warto?

✔ możesz zacząć nawet bez doświadczenia
✔ to realna opcja, żeby dorobić do budżetu
✔ poznasz ludzi z branży i znane twarze
✔ zbudujesz kontakty, które otwierają drzwi
✔ zobaczysz, jak naprawdę wygląda plan filmowy od środka

Dla jednych to przygoda.
Dla innych dodatkowy zarobek.
Dla niektórych – początek nowej drogi.

⚠️ To nie jest poradnik o „łatwej sławie”

To szczery przewodnik dla osób, które chcą wejść w ten świat świadomie i bez rozczarowań.

❤️ Kupując – pomagasz

Część dochodu ze sprzedaży zostanie przekazana na schronisko dla zwierząt 🐾

🔥 PROMOCJA: -20% tylko przez najbliższy tydzień

To najlepszy moment, żeby zacząć – taniej i z konkretną wiedzą w ręku.

🔥 Jeśli ja mogłem zacząć od zera – Ty też możesz.

⬇️Link do bezpośredniego zakupu 📲
https://www.naffy.io/bartlomiej-skowron/od-zera-do-planu-filmowego-praktyczny-przewodnik-epizodysty-oE1

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'OD ZERA FILMOWEGO DO/ DO praktyczny PLANU epizodysty epizodysty epizod przewodnik prze odnik SCENE SCENE PROD NO. DIRECTOR TAKE DATE RAMAN EXL INT. SOUND BarttomiejSkowron Skowron Barttomiej'

items.text:
Hej, hej! 🙋‍♀️ CASTING DO REKLAMY SIECI SKLEPÓW🐭 

Rusza pozytywny , kolorowy casting do nowej reklamy popularnej sieci sklepów– a MY szukamy wyjątkowych dzieciaków! 💛

👧👦 KOGO SZUKAMY?

• dzieci w wieku 8–12 lat

• dziewczynki i chłopcy

• wszystkie typy urody i sylwetki

• dzieci o różnym pochodzeniu etnicznym

Szczególnie mile widziane są także dzieci:

• z lekką nadwagą

• z aparatem na zębach

• z odstającymi uszami

• o nietypowej, charakterystycznej urodzie

❤️Najważniejsze: osobowość, naturalność i charakter!❤️

Poniżej znajdziecie najważniejsze informacje ⚠️ 

• Recall odbywa się wyłącznie na żywo – obecność obowiązkowa ❗ Lokalizacja: WARSZAWA

• Nie ma możliwości recallu online ❗ 

• Brak karty aktorskiej – nie jest wymagana❗ 

📅 TERMINY

• 30.03 (do godz. 8:00) – deadline na przesłanie zgłoszeń

• 03.04 – recall (na żywo)

• 09.04 – przymiarki

• 10.04 – dzień zdjęciowy

🎥 MATERIAŁY CASTINGOWE

Prosimy o nagranie:

1. Wizytówki
Krótko opowiedz coś o sobie 😊

2. Scenki naturalnej aktywności przy biurku, np.: rysowanie , układanie LEGO, puzzle, memory 🍀

👉 Ważne: 

 🤩 nagranie blisko (półzbliżenie) – tak, aby dobrze było widać twarz PLUS standardowo naturalność i swoboda – bez aktorstwa „na siłę”, dajmy dzieciom się pokazać w ich naturalnym wyczuciu ! 🍓☺️👌

Czekamy na Wasze zgłoszenia! 💌

Zapraszamy do aplikowania:

MAILOWO 👉 casting@unagimedia.pl / tytuł: 009

Pamiętajcie, że każde zgłoszenie powinno zawierać: imię, nazwisko, wiek, miejscowość, doświadczenie, zdjęcie portretowe oraz sylwetki (wyraźne, bez okularów, nakryć głowy, na jednolitym tle), wizytówkę dziecka, scenkę, wymiary: wzrost, rozmiar ubrania oraz obuwia (fajnie gdybyście umieścili również wymiary szczegółowe czyli: klatka piersiowa, pas, biodra)⭐️

To świetna okazja na pierwszą (lub kolejną!) przygodę przed kamerą ✨

Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi osobami, 

P O W O D Z E N I A !❤️

items.text:
Casting Call: 4-minute Student Film
We are a group of four university students looking for actors to star in our 4-minute film for a filmmaking course.

This film explores two long-time friends with things they haven't said to each other in the brief time they have between a nuclear strike warning and their deaths. It is of a more serious tone and contains themes related to mental health, which some may find triggering.

Location: Coquitlam, BC
Shoot date: Either Saturday, March 21st, or Sunday, March 22nd, depending on availability.
Compensation: Meals provided for duration of the shoot time, no monetary compensation.
Union status: Non-Union

Roles:

Character A: young adult roughly university student-aged, any gender and ethnicity

Anxious and emotional person who often worries about being liked by others. Upon the threat of nuclear strike, they deal with regret over the things they won't have time to do in the future. Despite all their self-focused spiraling however, they care deeply about their best friend, Character B.

Character B: young adult roughly university student-aged, any gender and ethnicity

A seemingly aloof person who comes across as very closed off and sardonic. Upon the the threat of nuclear strike, they deal with regret over their past actions. They don't let this show, however, and put on an indifferent face. Character B generally stays very guarded about their life, even around their best friend Character A. Although they have a tendency to lash out at others when faced with emotional vulnerability, they still care very deeply about Character A.

If interested in a role, please contact smp30@sfu.ca with name, headshot, preferred form of contact, and acting reel (if applicable) for further information.
