items.text:
Casting call for A Curated Exit (Theatre, Paid, non union)
**Production Company**

Shot in the Dark Productions
**Producer(s)**

Kristy Woollam and Richard White
**Director:**

Richard White
**Union Status**

Non-Union
**Project Type**

Theatre / Live Performance
**Compensation Details**

Profit Share
**Performance Date(s) and Locations**

Winnipeg International Fringe Festival July 13-26, 2026

Edmonton International Fringe Festival August 11-23, 2026

Vancouver - 3 night run, fall 2026 (TBD)
**Submission Deadline**

Friday, April 4, 2026

**Audition Dates and Location**

Vancouver. Call backs week of April 20 - 26th.
**Submission Instructions**

Please contact *[[Kristywoollam@gmail.com](mailto:Kristywoollam@gmail.com)](mailto:Kristywoollam@gmail.com)* to receive sides for a self tape.
Please submit your headshot, acting resume, and self tape to *[[Kristywoollam@gmail.com](mailto:Kristywoollam@gmail.com)](mailto:Kristywoollam@gmail.com)*.
**Project Synopsis**

A Curated Exit is a one act contemporary drama with strong comedic elements. It examines grief, love, and the commercialization of death. Zoe, a funeral director, sells The Device, nanotechnology that vaporizes the body at death and replaces it with a programmed experience. When her husband Steve dies suddenly, Zoe's quest to craft perfect endings collides with loss, memory, and the fragile line between technology and humanity.
**Casting for:**

***STEVE***** **Male lead. Any ethnicity. Age 30-50. Steve is a high school history teacher. He's a geek and loves pop culture. He is gentle and playful and often uses jokes to deflect direct questions about his emotions. He has a strong sense of social justice. Steve loves his wife deeply, but dies suddenly without telling her his biggest secret.

Programa de colaboraciones e investigación creativa de la residencia
GESTUALIDAD  DEL CUERPO COLECTIVO 2026

SISTEMATIZACIÓN CREATIVA

Para esta edición, abrimos un nuevo programa de colaboración artística que busca reducir los costos a personas que quieren participar y colaborar con el proyecto y que no pueden asumir el monto completo. 

Se trata de acompañar la residencia desde un registro vivo de lo que acontece: hechos, experiencias y testimonios, de manera orgánica, sin interferir en tu propio proceso.

Este registro puede tomar la forma que desees: escritura, dibujo, performance, fotografía, diseño, entrevistas… el lenguaje que te sea más natural. La intención es que la residencia también se convierta en un espacio de investigación y producción de conocimiento vivo. 

A través de este programa, dos artistas podrán participar de toda la experiencia con un aporte menor al 50% del costo total.
Ven y se parte de este maravilloso proyecto de Residencia de Creación artística! 
En la hermosa Hacienda Paucartika ubicada en el valle sagrado de los Incas, Lamay, a los pies del Apu y centro arqueológico de Huchuy Qosqo!

CASTING CALL: PAID NON-UNION
EDUCATIONAL - LOS ANGELES

SUBMIT - sumeet.dang@icloud.com

Please submit with fitness pictures

LOCATION - Los Angeles area 

SHOOT DATE: 1 day, either Friday, March 27 or Saturday March 28th, need both days available. 

RATE: $200 for 8-10 hour shoot

UNION STATUS - NON-UNION

CAST NEEDS:

1 athletic MALE fitness model who is comfortable doing sustained breathing practices for long periods and who are comfortable sitting cross-legged and being guided through meditation practices. Open ethnicity, aged 25-40. 

1 athletic FEMALE fitness model who is comfortable doing sustained breathing practices for long periods and who are comfortable sitting cross-legged and being guided through meditation practices. SOUTH ASIAN/EAST INDIAN, aged 25-40. 

MORE INFORMATION: 

This is for an education meditation and breath work series for an accredited Indian Knowledge System meditation practice with research backed meditation practices for improving mental health.

This will be a really fun and relaxing shoot. You will be guided through many relaxing energizing meditation practices that will leave you feeling vibrant. 

To submit, please email: 

- headshot

- Some fitness pictures

- Confirm you’re comfortable doing longer periods of breath-work exercises

SUBJECT LINE: ROLE - Actor Name

Example: Fitness Model - Jane Smith

items.text:
**Seeking Director of Photography for Low Budget Dramedy Feature Film - "Incautious" (Chicago, IL)**

**“Incautious” Plot Summary:**

A stay-at-home mother struggles to watch over her children as she finds herself addicted to alcohol and other drugs. A broken man takes out his anguish on his wife and children.

***Compensation:***

**Rate: **Paid (Send me your rates)
**Payment:** Up to 17 Shooting Days, all on weekends

**Tentative Shoot Days: (All on Weekends)**

Sunday, May 3, Saturday, May 9, Sunday, May 10, Saturday, May 16, Sunday, May 17, Saturday, May 23, Sunday, May 24, Saturday May 30, Sunday, June 7th, Saturday, June 13, Sunday, June 14, Sunday, June 21, Saturday, June 27, Sunday, June 28, Sunday, July 12, Saturday, July 18, Backup Day - Saturday, July 25

**Duties:**

1. Bring his/her own camera equipment to the film set
2. Execution of Cinematography plan
3. Setting up Camera equipment in a timely efficient manner

4. Determining elements such as filters, shutter angles, focus, depth, of field and camera distance

5. Answering any questions the Director may have regarding Cinematography

**Role Requirements:**

1. A Reel of Visual Work

2. Be an approachable team player
3. Must show up on time and have good time management skills

4. Good technical camera operating skills
5. Good organizational skills

6. A great eye for detail
7. The ability to plan ahead regarding camera setups

**Director's Bio:**

Harry is a passionate filmmaker who has been watching movies since as long as he can remember. Some of his favorite films include, "Memento", "The Dark Knight", "The Lord of the Rings" trilogy, "Alien", “The Shining” etc. He has seen over 11,000 films and is as crazy about movies as any individual you will ever meet. Harry has worked on a number of various films, and has written, produced, directed, and edited "515", "Enter the Room", “In the Backseat”, “Bay for Blood” and “The Corridor Crossing”.

**More Info, Contact Information:**
If you are interested in this project, please contact me at edgewaterfilmproductions@gmail.com.

Also, feel free to visit my website. The link is listed below.
http://www.edgewaterfilmproduction.com/

**Contact Name: **Harry Waldman
**Contact Email: **edgewaterfilmproductions@gmail.com
**Contact Address:** Chicago, Illinois, 60626, United States
**Organization:** Edgewater Film Productions

items.text:
DONNA GROSSMAN CASTING  -NOW CASTING — ACTOR MOMS WITH THEIR OWN 6 - 8 MONTH OLD BABY

Non‑Union • Goat Milk for Babies

We’re casting a real mother, who is an actor, and her baby for a warm, authentic, user-generated style video campaign.

Production is looking for a genuine, playful mother-baby connection, and the natural rhythm that only comes from a real parent and child.

MOM
25–35 years old

Dark hair / US Latina or mixed‑race look preferred, but open to all

Strong with conversational copy (NO ACCENTS)

Warm, natural, responsive to baby, comfortable ad‑libbing

BABY
6–8 months old

Expressive, curious, babbly, sweet

Not too much hair (still very baby‑like)

RATES + USAGE
Mom Session: $750 + 20%

Baby Session: $500 + 20%

Mom Usage (If Final video/stills are used): $7,000 + 20%

Baby Usage (If Final video/stills are used): $3,000 + 20%

Usage: 1‑year worldwide digital/social (no broadcast)

ONE SHOOT DAY:
Week of April 6 or April 13

To submit, please email Dgcasting@donnagrossmancasting.com with your name, your baby’s age, and recent photos.

* Special Note: Baby will not need to drink goat milk.

We are an Independent production company looking to establish ourselves with our filmmaking debut & we are looking for our leading lady to join our team!

         The character has a business mindset with greedy intentions that has a unique fashion sense. It's important to us that you're comfortable with our wardrobe requests...Our vision for the character is she wears a variety of outfits in a leather jacket & cozy sweaters with leather pants, & long boots preferably flat not heel.

Short film (Around 40 min.)
Film will be entered in film festivals. 
Pay: $1,000 + IMDb credit 
*If you're interested, send a headshot,  link to your IMDb page (if you have one), & link to your Instagram to this email: deowainstaproductions@gmail.com 

We will send a follow-up email with a short slide (scene) for you to make an audition tape for us. 

We will appreciate it if you go support our Instagram & YouTube channel! Upon doing so we will keep you in mind for opportunities in our future film projects!

https://www.instagram.com/deowainsta_productions?igsh=MTNoM3JzaGl2bjZ6OQ==

https://youtube.com/@deowainstaproductions?si=sJs83boxoJO_7oTA

The film is a psychological thriller based on Native American folklore'

**🎬 Casting Call — Kandor Kin**

**Vertical Micro-Drama Series · Burbank, CA · March 30th**

**UNPAID · PORTFOLIO / REEL CREDIT**

We're casting two lead roles for **Kandor Kin** — a vertical narrative series following a self-sustaining creative collective. Shot in one day, three episodes, one location. Intimate, dialogue-driven, cinematic.

This is an unpaid opportunity. We're looking for actors who want a quality project for their portfolio and a team that takes the work seriously.

OPEN ROLES

**ASHA — Lead Producer**

BLACK MAN · 30S · OPEN TO TYPE

The architect of the collective. He leads through quiet authority — structured, intentional, every word chosen. He doesn't raise his voice because he doesn't have to. Think stillness as power. He's built something real and he knows it. The role requires presence more than performance.

**ZORA — Member in Training**

WOMAN · 20S · OPEN ETHNICITY

She arrives guarded and leaves with her shoulders down for the first time in a while. Her arc is almost entirely physical — a slow exhale across the episode. Most of what she communicates happens between the lines. Looking for someone who can make a salad order feel like the end of a journey.

**SHOOT DETAILS**

TIME1:00 PM – 8:00 PM

LOCATION: Burbank, CA (full address on confirmation)

FORMATVertical (9:16) — shot for mobile

To submit — comment with the role you're interested in and a brief note about yourself. Sides will be sent to those selected for a self-tape.

topComments.text: I’d be interested in the role of Zora! I have over 20 verticals I was in since last year!

items.text:
Auditions for Home I'm Darling at Cabrillo Playhouse in San Clemente!
AUDITIONS!!!

Home I’m Darling
By Laura Wade
Directed by Hillary Pearson

Auditions: Sunday March 29th 6pm-10pm and Monday March 30th 6pm-10pm (choose one date)
Callbacks: (if necessary) by invitation Tuesday, March 31st 6pm-10pm
Performances May 22nd -June 14th , Thursdays through Sundays

For auditions, cold reading sides will be available. Please bring a headshot and
resume and be prepared to list any conflicts.
Rehearsals will be held at Cabrillo Playhouse, Mondays through Thursdays 7pm-10pm with some Saturdays. Tech/Dress Rehearsal week rehearsals may be extended.

Synopsis: Home, I’m Darling by Laura Wade is a clever and thought-provoking comedy that explores what happens when nostalgia becomes a way of life. Judy has stepped away from the modern world to embrace the role of the perfect 1950s housewife. However, perfection often comes at a price. Behind the smiles and immaculate surfaces, tensions begin to simmer. Home, I’m Darling is a sharp, stylish comedy with a layered take on nostalgia, feminism, and the complexities of relationships. It explores how we construct and cling to our own versions of reality, and what happens when those carefully built narratives start to unravel.

All Characters use a British accent. Region is flexible by character.
There is a small stipend offered.
We welcome and encourage performers of ALL races, ages, gender identities, abilities, body types and ethnicities to audition.

Character Breakdown can be found at [https://cabrilloplayhouse.org/auditions-casting-call/](https://cabrilloplayhouse.org/auditions-casting-call/)

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of ‎text that says '‎Thrilling and entertaining audiences since 1953 Cabrillo Playhouse نبسسالمر MIR Home, r Darling by Laura Wade May 22 to June 14, 2026 www.cabrilloplayhouse.org‎'‎

items.text: Encuentro de ARTe en Comunidad!
items.previewTitle:
AYLLU ARTe

ENCUENTRO DE ARTE EN COMUNIDAD

COMMUNITY ART MEETING

5ta edición - MARZO 28 Y 29

El Festival promueve el encuentro de las artes y la cultura para el desarrollo y bienestar social a través de un programa de 2 días de actividades artísticas educativas, un espacio donde podamos visibilizar e impulsar la producción y trabajo de artistas y emprendedores locales  e internacionales, una plataforma que propicia un entorno de colaboración y celebración colectiva.

Música en vivo, DJS, Danza Extática, Sound Healing, Cosmovisión andina, Talleres de arte, Exposiciones, Presentaciones artísticas, Varieté, Feria de productos artesanales, Emprendimientos locales y alimentos, Proyecciones y espacios temáticos.

- 28 DANZA EXTÁTICA de 4.PM A 11.PM 

PROGRAMA:

5.PM OPEN MIC Y FERIA “PISAC PULSE”

6.PM CIRCULO DE CACAO & WARM UP Con Ana Rebolledo.

6.30PM DJ MATT JAH 

8.30 DJS AYMA B2B INSPIRAL

10.30PM SOUND HEALING

Sachi Djembe - Dieltrene Saxon - Estrella Voz -Leonathan Vientos - Ailinsinha Voz

- Domingo 29 VARIETE de 6.PM a 8.PM 

ARTISTAS: Eric Otero Clown - Toño Marache Equilibrio - Mahkenzi full circle Delia Multihoop - Mila Fire dragon - Alain Trapecio - Prcyrcus Rueda cyr - Amayu Danza - Jota Malabar Monociclo. MÚSICOS: Nitai - Dieltrene - Inti - El Chuy

Ven y participa de los talleres, deleita tu paladar con productos locales, disfruta en familia, sorprendete con grandes artistas, trae tú mejor intención para la conciencia colectiva, vibra a través de las ondas sonoras, conecta con el arte, vive una experiencia de integración Holística y bienestar social. 

Entrada General S/100 x 2 Días Pre venta en Solseed y Shambhala.

DANZA EXTÁTICA S/70 - Pre venta S/50

VARIETE - PUKLLAY S/30 - Pre venta S/20 Niños y Niñas ingreso libre.

Venta  en Solseed y Shambhala al +51967098711

Gracias a las Alianzas y Colaboradores:

AYLLU ARTe

ENCUENTRO DE ARTE EN COMUNIDAD

COMMUNITY ART MEETING

5ta edición - MARZO 28 Y 29

El Festival promueve el encuentro de las artes y la cultura para el desarrollo y bienestar social a través de un programa de 2 días de actividades artísticas educativas, un espacio donde podamos visibilizar e impulsar la producción y trabajo de artistas y emprendedores locales  e internacionales, una plataforma que propicia un entorno de colaboración y celebración colectiva.

Música en vivo, DJS, Danza Extática, Sound Healing, Cosmovisión andina, Talleres de arte, Exposiciones, Presentaciones artísticas, Varieté, Feria de productos artesanales, Emprendimientos locales y alimentos, Proyecciones y espacios temáticos.

- 28 DANZA EXTÁTICA de 4.PM A 11.PM 

PROGRAMA:

5.PM OPEN MIC Y FERIA “PISAC PULSE”

6.PM CIRCULO DE CACAO & WARM UP Con Ana Rebolledo.

6.30PM DJ MATT JAH 

8.30 DJS AYMA B2B INSPIRAL

10.30PM SOUND HEALING

Sachi Djembe - Dieltrene Saxon - Estrella Voz -Leonathan Vientos - Ailinsinha Voz

- Domingo 29 VARIETE de 6.PM a 8.PM 

ARTISTAS: Eric Otero Clown - Toño Marache Equilibrio - Mahkenzi full circle Delia Multihoop - Mila Fire dragon - Alain Trapecio - Prcyrcus Rueda cyr - Amayu Danza - Jota Malabar Monociclo. MÚSICOS: Nitai - Dieltrene - Inti - El Chuy

Ven y participa de los talleres, deleita tu paladar con productos locales, disfruta en familia, sorprendete con grandes artistas, trae tú mejor intención para la conciencia colectiva, vibra a través de las ondas sonoras, conecta con el arte, vive una experiencia de integración Holística y bienestar social.

Für eine Film-/Videoproduktion suchen wir einen Schauspieler mit folgendem Profil:
• Männlich, ca. 45–60 Jahre

 • Markantes Gesicht, gerne mit leichten Altersmerkmalen (z. B. Geheimratsecken, Bartansatz)

 • Eher ernster, durchsetzungsstarker Ausdruck

 • Gepflegtes, seriöses Auftreten (z. B. Arzt-/Autoritätstyp)

 • Authentische Ausstrahlung, starke Präsenz

Rolle:

Ein strenger, fokussierter Charakter (z. B. Arzt oder Autoritätsperson), der ruhig, aber intensiv spielt – wenig Worte, viel Ausdruck.

Drehort: Kreis Recklinghausen

Drehzeit: April für einen Drehtag

Gage: kann gerne Privat besprochen werden

Bei Interesse bitte mit aktuellen Fotos und ggf. Referenzen melden 🙌

items.text:
CASTING CALL - Student Film
Hi!! We are looking for two actors for a student film shot in Prague. The film is in English, and the crew is English speaking. 

General storyline: a couple is cooking for dinner, but they are missing the main ingredient. As they bicker back and forth, they discover their lack of trust in one another. 

Sarah — A female actress, 22-25, to play a caring and detailed-oriented young lady. 

Tom — A male actor,  22-25, to play a calm and sympathetic young man. 

Both should be comfortable with some physicality (kiss on the cheek, hug etc.). A fluent level of English is required. 

We are open to casting not only individuals but also a couple!

Shoot dates: April 15-19

As we are a no budget student film, we do not have the option to give compensation. However, food and beverages will be provided!!

If you’re interested and available, please send an email to barunka.vas@gmail.com or DM me with a picture and a short introduction of you (+ your past experience if applicable) 💗

items.text:
CASTING CALL: LONDON ONTARIO

Hi everyone, I am a first-year film student at Fanshawe.  I am directing a thriller short film called “Redacted” .We are looking for three main roles: 

**Synopsis**

Dianna Sloan is one of the best; she solves cases faster than anyone. She falls asleep and wakes up the next morning with the answer. When Sergeant Ryder gives her one of the hardest cases regarding a Mob Boss, her dream is what helps her solve it. Dianna Sloan fights to change how the dream ends, so it will not become a reality. The catch is that she is the one who really needs to be caught, to truly solve the case.

**Dianna Sloan **(20s-30s) - Female

A lead badass FBI detective, she will take on any case and is confident she will make it out alive every time, after a supernatural experience the case is seen in a new light.

**Sergeant Ryder **(20s-30s) Male

The FBI sergeant cares about what Dianna gets herself into, but is always there to help her out. Sergeant Ryder is strict about getting the job done, but is still the world’s best boss.

**Mob Boss **(20s-30s) Male

 A powerful man who gets what he wants and is willing to put up a fight. He is the type of person you do not want to mess with.

These are UNPAID roles

We are aiming to shoot over the next two weeks 

If you are interested in one of these roles, you can reach me via Gmail at R3DACTEDFilm@gmail.com

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'REDACTED FILMING MARCH 26, MARCH 27, APRIL APRIL2ND 2ND EMAIL LR3DACTEDFILM@GMAILCOM FOR MORE DETAILS'

items.text:
What if a law came out tomorrow saying you could only do ONE acting exercise for the rest of your life?

What would you choose?

In this week’s video, Mark asks that exact question… and then shows why the answer might not be what most actors think.
Watch me break down Hugo Weaving’s ice-cold Agent Smith monologue from The Matrix and reveal the one technique that powers every great performance — yet so many of us quietly neglect.

It’s back-to-basics, it’s eye-opening, and it applies whether you’re doing Shakespeare, action films, or gritty drama.

The link to the video is in the comments.
items.title: Why Most Actors Get Their Voice Wrong - Learn from Hugo Weaving

items.text:
🎬 Schauspielerin gesucht für Sitcom-Serie! 🎬
Wir sind aktuell mitten in den Dreharbeiten zu unserer Sitcom und suchen noch Verstärkung für unser Team!  

Wen wir suchen:  

- Frau, Alter: ca. 20–40 Jahre  

- Erscheinung: blond, blauäugig  

- Ausstrahlung: frech, humorvoll, locker drauf und natürlich mit Charakter  

- Erfahrung: nicht notwendig!  

Wichtig:  

- Du solltest zuverlässig sein  

- Wohnort idealerweise in der Nähe von Koblenz  

- Dreh findet jedes Wochenende statt  

- Projekt ist unbezahlt (no budget / unpaid)  

⚠️ Wichtig: Morgen ist bereits ein Drehtag – es wäre super, wenn wir bis dahin schon jemanden finden!  

Wenn du Lust hast, Teil eines kreativen Projekts zu werden und vor der Kamera zu stehen, dann melde dich gerne bei uns!  

📩 Schreib uns einfach eine DM mit ein paar Infos über dich (gerne auch mit Foto)!  

Wir freuen uns auf dich! 🎥✨

Hey liebe Filmfreunde
Kurze Frage, wenn ich eine neue Filmseite aufmachen möchte für die Crew, damit jeder sieht was abgeht und durchgehende Communication herrscht, was bietet sich besser an  Facebook WhatsApp oder was ganz anderes. Ich habe aktuell das Problem das viele Leute manche Plattformen garnicht besitzen, und es ist nicht einfach alle auf einer Seite zusammenzubringen. Oder über welche Social Media Seiten findet ihr am meisten Jobs für Filmproduktionen. Gibt mir bitte Bescheid welche Erfahrungen ihr gemacht habt!

topComments.text: Wir haben es über WhatsApp gemacht. Jeder hat es und funktioniert am besten. Erstell einfach ne Gruppe.
Ja, eine WhatsApp-Gruppe hat sich gut bewährt.

items.text:
𝗖𝗮𝘀𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗖𝗮𝗹𝗹: 𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗠𝗶𝗹𝗹𝗲𝗻𝗻𝗶𝗮𝗹
𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗷𝗲𝗰𝘁 𝗧𝘆𝗽𝗲: Short Film / Proof of Concept (Non-union)

𝗗𝗲𝘀𝗰𝗿𝗶𝗽𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻

This is a brief proof of concept (under 5 minutes) for a complete short film currently in development. The project is a cinematic reconstruction of a true story. We are producing this self-contained excerpt to establish the visual style, tone, and narrative direction of the larger film.

𝗟𝗼𝗴𝗹𝗶𝗻𝗲

A psychological drama about the story of an immigrant who finds himself facing a choice in a difficult life situation: to continue working hard at the port or to finally realize and follow his dream.

𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗗𝗲𝘁𝗮𝗶𝗹𝘀

𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻: OFF MIRROR Studio

𝗗𝗶𝗿𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗼𝗿: V. Chase Malukha

𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝗲𝗿: Maryna Malukha

𝗦𝗵𝗼𝗼𝘁 𝗗𝗮𝘁𝗲𝘀: 1-2 days, March 27 or March 28

𝗟𝗼𝗰𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻: Vancouver

𝗥𝗮𝘁𝗲 𝗼𝗳 𝗣𝗮𝘆: Volunteer. Meals, copy for reel, and credit provided.

𝗥𝗢𝗟𝗘:

𝗟𝗘𝗔𝗗 – Male, 25-40

𝗖𝗵𝗮𝗿𝗮𝗰𝘁𝗲𝗿 𝗕𝗿𝗲𝗮𝗸𝗱𝗼𝘄𝗻:

• 𝗣𝗿𝗲𝘀𝗲𝗻𝗰𝗲 / 𝗚𝗮𝘇𝗲: We are looking for depth and intelligence. The actor must be able to "hold the frame in silence," allowing the audience to read his internal monologue.

• 𝗠𝗶𝗰𝗿𝗼-𝗲𝘅𝗽𝗿𝗲𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀: The ability to convey quiet panic, disorientation, and intense internal struggle without overacting.

• 𝗧𝗿𝗮𝗻𝘀𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗺𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻: The ability to organically transition from a state of complete powerlessness and despair to a sudden epiphany and newfound grounding.

𝗩𝗶𝘀𝘂𝗮𝗹 𝗖𝗼𝗻𝘁𝗲𝘅𝘁:

Urban noir aesthetic. Isolation in a crowd, the cold light of a metropolis, the intimacy of an epiphany. This is highly internalized acting (working "under the skin").

𝗦𝗨𝗕𝗠𝗜𝗦𝗦𝗜𝗢𝗡 & 𝗦𝗘𝗟𝗙-𝗧𝗔𝗣𝗘 𝗜𝗡𝗦𝗧𝗥𝗨𝗖𝗧𝗜𝗢𝗡𝗦:

Please submit your Headshot, Resume/Profile link, and Self-Tape to: maryna@offmirror.studio

𝗦𝘂𝗯𝗷𝗲𝗰𝘁 𝗟𝗶𝗻𝗲: THE MILLENNIAL - your name

• 𝗦𝗲𝗹𝗳-𝗧𝗮𝗽𝗲 𝗜𝗻𝘀𝘁𝗿𝘂𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀: Prepare a silent scene (up to 2 minutes). Theatricality and overacting are strictly discouraged.

• 𝗦𝘂𝗯𝗺𝗶𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗗𝗲𝗮𝗱𝗹𝗶𝗻𝗲: March 25, 11:59 PM. (We are casting on a tight turnaround).
items.summary:
𝗖𝗮𝘀𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗖𝗮𝗹𝗹: 𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗠𝗶𝗹𝗹𝗲𝗻𝗻𝗶𝗮𝗹
𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗷𝗲𝗰𝘁 𝗧𝘆𝗽𝗲: Short Film / Proof of Concept (Non-union)

𝗗𝗲𝘀𝗰𝗿𝗶𝗽𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻

This is a brief proof of concept (under 5 minutes) for a complete short film currently in development. The project is a cinematic reconstruction of a true story. We are producing this self-contained excerpt to establish the visual style, tone, and narrative direction of the larger film.

𝗟𝗼𝗴𝗹𝗶𝗻𝗲

A psychological drama about the story of an immigrant who finds himself facing a choice in a difficult life situation: to continue working hard at the port or to finally realize and follow his dream.

𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗗𝗲𝘁𝗮𝗶𝗹𝘀

𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻: OFF MIRROR Studio

𝗗𝗶𝗿𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗼𝗿: V. Chase Malukha

𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝗲𝗿: Maryna Malukha

𝗦𝗵𝗼𝗼𝘁 𝗗𝗮𝘁𝗲𝘀: 1-2 days, March 27 or March 28

𝗟𝗼𝗰𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻: Vancouver

𝗥𝗮𝘁𝗲 𝗼𝗳 𝗣𝗮𝘆: Volunteer. Meals, copy for reel, and credit provided.

𝗥𝗢𝗟𝗘:

𝗟𝗘𝗔𝗗 – Male, 25-40

𝗖𝗵𝗮𝗿𝗮𝗰𝘁𝗲𝗿 𝗕𝗿𝗲𝗮𝗸𝗱𝗼𝘄𝗻:

• 𝗣𝗿𝗲𝘀𝗲𝗻𝗰𝗲 / 𝗚𝗮𝘇𝗲: We are looking for depth and intelligence. The actor must be able to "hold the frame in silence," allowing the audience to read his internal monologue.

• 𝗠𝗶𝗰𝗿𝗼-𝗲𝘅𝗽𝗿𝗲𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀: The ability to convey quiet panic, disorientation, and intense internal struggle without overacting.

• 𝗧𝗿𝗮𝗻𝘀𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗺𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻: The ability to organically transition from a state of complete powerlessness and despair to a sudden epiphany and newfound grounding.

𝗩𝗶𝘀𝘂𝗮𝗹 𝗖𝗼𝗻𝘁𝗲𝘅𝘁:

Urban noir aesthetic. Isolation in a crowd, the cold light of a metropolis, the intimacy of an epiphany. This is highly internalized acting (working "under the skin").

𝗦𝗨𝗕𝗠𝗜𝗦𝗦𝗜𝗢𝗡 & 𝗦𝗘𝗟𝗙-𝗧𝗔𝗣𝗘 𝗜𝗡𝗦𝗧𝗥𝗨𝗖𝗧𝗜𝗢𝗡𝗦:

Please submit your Headshot, Resume/Profile link, and Self-Tape to: maryna@offmirror.studio

𝗦𝘂𝗯𝗷𝗲𝗰𝘁 𝗟𝗶𝗻𝗲: THE MILLENNIAL - your name

• 𝗦𝗲𝗹𝗳-𝗧𝗮𝗽𝗲 𝗜𝗻𝘀𝘁𝗿𝘂𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀: Prepare a silent scene (up to 2 minutes). Theatricality and overacting are strictly discouraged.

• 𝗦𝘂𝗯𝗺𝗶𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗗𝗲𝗮𝗱𝗹𝗶𝗻𝗲: March 25, 11:59 PM. (We are casting on a tight turnaround).

items.text:
**🎬 CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM: “MY AIM IS TRUE”**
**(Vancouver, BC | NON-UNION)**

Indie film (10–15 minutes) seeking strong actors for two roles. Dramatic, literary, and dialogue-driven (inspired by a classic play).

**ROLES:**

**STEVE MATTICE (Male, 55–70) — LEAD**
A confident, gregarious, and happily married politician, who aspires to be party leader. He receives unsettling news that may damage his reputation.** Substantial role across full shoot.**

**SORAYA BAHAR (Female, 55–70) --SUPPORTING**

A veteran CBC journalist and Abigail Mattice’s (Steve’s wife’s) best friend and confidante. Her life is turned upside down by a revelation from her distant past.
**Smaller, dialogue-heavy role (approx. one scene / shorter shoot time).**

**SHOOT DETAILS:**
📍 East Vancouver, BC
🗓 1–2 shoot days (week of April 20) + 1 rehearsal

**PAY:**
💰 Steve Mattice: $200 stipend + meals
💰 Soraya Bahar: $100 stipend + meals

**PERKS:**
🎥 Festival submissions
🎬 Professional-quality reel footage
🤝 Focused, collaborative set

**TO APPLY:**
Please send by April 3rd:
• Headshot
• Short bio or résumé
• Reel/clips (if available, not required)

To  Kegan Doyle: [Kegan.doyle@kpu.ca](mailto:Kegan.doyle@kpu.ca)

Contact me if you have questions.

**This is a great opportunity for experienced actors who enjoy doing character-driven work.**

sharedPost.text:
Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon 

MOVIETIME KW 13/2026

B MOVIE ACTION?,  EINE HORRORKÖMÖDIE UND DIE THEATERGRUPPE ZELLERNDORF IM TALK

Erinnerungen an die 80er Jahre werden wach, wenn Jason Statham sich zumindest einmal im Jahr durch einen Film durchkloppt (SHELTER). 

Dass Horrorfilme auch witzig sein können beweist der erste Film der Produktionsfirma Nocturna (THEY WILL KILL YOU) .

Ente gut, alles gut lautet das Stück der Theatergruppe Zellerndorf. Wir konnten mit insgesamt 5 Beteiligten an dieser Produktion Interviews führen. 

Abgerundet wird die Sendung  mit Awardwinnern best Song der letzten 90 Jahre sowie Musik aus den aktuellen Filmen.

Mittwoch 25.3.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

items.text:
Für eine Film-/Videoproduktion suchen wir eine ältere Schauspielerin mit folgendem Profil:
 • Weiblich, ca. 65–80 Jahre
 • Natürliches, authentisches Erscheinungsbild
 • Graue oder weiße Haare
 • Ausdrucksstarkes Gesicht, das Emotionen gut transportieren kann
 • Keine Model-Erfahrung notwendig – wichtig ist Glaubwürdigkeit

Rolle:
Eine ältere Frau in einer intensiven, emotionalen Situation (Schmerz/Unwohlsein wird dargestellt). Schauspielerische Ausdrucksstärke und Authentizität sind hier besonders wichtig.

Drehort: Kreis Recklinghausen
Drehzeit: April für einen Drehtag
Gage: kann gerne Privat besprochen werden

Bei Interesse bitte mit aktuellen Fotos und ggf. Referenzen melden 🙌
